If Cauda Draconis in thesecond, then he denotes confumpticm of Eftate by the Qjereux's owne solly or not thriving, by his owne proper negiesifc
If Cauda Draconis in the third, then hinderance by evil!, beggarly or pee vilh Kinred
If the Lord of the Ascendant and the Moon are joyned to the Lord of the eighth, who is Lord of the Subftance of the party quesited after, then he lhall obtaine the money delired

If the Lord of the Ascendant or the Moon be joyned, or in afpett to a Planet polked in the eighth, if the Planet in the eighth be a Fortune, or the afpeand it selte sortunate, then he lhall obtaine the money delired

If the Lord of the Ascendant or the Moon be joyned, or in afpett to a Planet polked in the eighth, if the Planet in the eighth be a Fortune, or the afpeand it selte sortunate, then the money required will be lent him

If the Lord of the Ascendant or the Moon be joyned, or in afpett to a Planet polked in the eighth, if the Planet in the eighth be a Fortune, or the afpeand it selte sortunate, then if he have deposited any Pledge, it will be reftored, whether the sortunate Planet in the eighth be received or not
If an infortunate Planet be in the eighth, or Lord of the eighth, and receive either the Lord of the Ascendant or the Moon, then the Querent lhall obtaine his desire
If no reception, then he will hardly or ever procure his demands, and if ever, with so much difficulty and labours he would rather wilh the thing. bod been undone
If the Lord of the eighth be in tne ftrft, or in the second, and the Lord of the second receive him, then it's pro bable the businefTe will be effefted

If the Lord of the seyenth, or of the eighth be in the sirft or second, and neither have reception of the Lord of the sirft or second house, or of the Moon, then it’s an argument he (hallnot have his desire accomplifhed, but (hall receive a deniall or more prejudice in the thins de¬ manded
If the Lord of the Ascendant and the Moon be joyned to a Fortune ‘that hath dignity in the Signe afcending, or Sisne inter¬ cepted in the Ascendant, then the matter will be effcanded
If any ol them be joyned to an Infortune who hath dignity in the A(¬ cendant, asd that I sortune receive the Lord of the Aftendant or the Moon, then the businelTe will be difpatched
If the Lord of the Alcendant or the Moon be joyned to asortunateplanet, an dire well placed either in the tenth or eleventh, then the matter (hall be perfeffed, though there be no reception

If the Lord of the Ascendant or the Moon joyned to the Lord of the eleventh house, then the Querent (hall obtaine what Salary, wages, debt,or money the great perfon of what quality soever owes unto him

If the Lord of the Ascendant or the Moon be joyned to any Planet in the eleventh house; and that Planet be'a Fortune , not in any measure impedited,or ill difpoied, then the Querent (hall obtaine what Salary, wages, debt,or money the great perfon of what quality soever owes unto him

If the Moon and Lord of the ascendant be Joyned to an unfortunate Planet, and he receive them into some of his effinthll dignities, then the querent shall obtaineliis Monies, Wa- ges,8tc. but not without much solicitation, many weary ad^ drefLs, seares and disirufts
If any Afpeft be betwixt the Signisicators, the one being ah infortune and without re¬ ception, then the querent will never obtaine what he desires
If Planet applies to or is joined by body to the Lord of the Ascendant or Moon, then Signifies the effecting and performance of the matter quesited after

If Planet is in square or opposition with the Lord of the Ascendant or Moon, whether a Fortune or not, or receive the Lord of the Ascendant or Moon or not, then Consider well how both of them project their beams or rayes to each other, until they come to their perfect aspect
If Significators are both in Cadent houses, then The matter shall be so many days as are the number of degrees between the Significators
If Significators are in Succedant houses, then The matter will be so many weeks
If Significators are in Angles, then The time will be so many months
If Lord of the Ascendant and other Significators are in Angles, then Instead of months you may add years
If One Planet is in an Angle, and the other in a Succedant, then They shall signify months
If One Planet is in a Succedant and the other in a Cadent, then They shall denote weeks
If One Planet is in an Angle, and the other in a Cadent house, then They prenote months

If Planet which signifies the perfection of the thing demanded is in one Sign with the Lord of the Ascendant, then The matter shall then be brought to conclusion when that Planet and the Lord of the Ascendant come to corporal conjunction in Degree and Minute

If Lord of the Ascendant is the more light Planet, so that he make haste to the conjunction of the Planet signifying the effecting of the matter, and that Planet receive the Lord of the Ascendant, then The matter will be finished

If Planet shall not receive the Lord of the Ascendant, then The matter will not be effected, unless the aforesaid significators be in an Angle when the Conjunction shall be, or in one of his own Houses, and especially in that house which is called his joy
If Single reception by exaltation without other testimonies, then Profiteth not
If Reception by essential dignities of House, when benevolent Planets are significators, though by square or opposition aspect, then Usually shows perfection, yea beyond expectation
If Reception by essential dignities of House, when benevolent Planets are significators, by trine or sextile aspect, then Very certainly shows perfection

If Fortune, or the Moon or Lord of the thing quesited be in the Ascendant, and have any essential dignity therein, then The number of Degrees between the Cusp of the Ascendant and body of the Planet, doth denote the time when

If Fortune, or the Moon or Lord of the thing quesited be in the Ascendant, and have any essential dignity therein, in a moveable Sign, then The number of Degrees between the Cusp of the Ascendant and body of the Planet, doth denote the time when, in days
If Lady of the ascendant was near to Regulus, then He should subsist in the Commonwealthy and live in good ranke and quality amongst his Neighbours
If Lord of the second is posited in the Angle of the East, and that the Lord of the second is Lord of Venus or Dispositor thereof, and is neere Spica, then Wealth
If Jupiter a generall significator of Wealth, was in his exaltation and Angular, calling his square sinister very neer to the degree amending, then Wealth

If Moon seperated newly from a conjunction of Saturn Lord of the second, and significator of the thing demanded,and immediately after seperated from Saturn of Jupiter, then instantly applying to the conjunction of the Moon of Jupiter significator of the thing demanded, then Wealth

If A general significator of wealth is in its exaltation and angular, calling his sinister square very near to the degree amending, which square in signs of long ascensions, then Usually reputed a trine.

If Moon separates from a conjunction of the lord of the second house, and significator of the thing demanded, and immediately after separated from Saturn, then instantly applying to the conjunction of Jupiter significator of the Querent, transferring thereby both the vertue and influence of Saturn and Jupiter to the proper significator of the Querent, then Much good for the Querent.
If The Moon is also disposed by the Sun and he is strong and powerfully, then Much good for the Querent.

If Jupiter was in a fixed sign and in his own terms, then The Demandant would acquire an Estate, and have a competent fortune in this world, but attain it with labour and care, because it is signified by an Infortune.

If Saturn, lord of the seventh house (which is the house of Women and Wives) has the most material signification of the thing demanded viz. Wealth and Riches, then Advise to marry, and acquainted him that without Marriage he should nothing so well subsist.
If Saturn in our scheme being Lord of the second house and of Mercury, then An estate to be got by the Querent's own industry.
If The Signisicator of the thing demanded is posited in the ascendant, then An estate or increase thereof would come somewhat easily or with less labour then expanded.
If Saturn is Lord of the seventh house, then He would marry a Woman who would produce him a good fortune, and it fixed, and more then he could very well look for.

If The Lord of the seventh is in the ascendant and near so eminent a fixed Star, then He would marry a Woman who would produce him a good fortune, and it fixed, and more then he could very well look for.

If Venus, who is Lady of his wives house of substance, viz. the eighth, is so well fortified, then He would marry a Woman who would produce him a good fortune, and it fixed, and more then he could very well look for.

If The Moon was Lady of the tenth house (which signified his Trade) that she was transferring the light and nature of Jupiter and Saturn to the Querent, then Advised him to diligence in his profession and that he should thereby attain a very good or competent Estate.
If Venus in the tenth, then A certain and infallible argument that the querent shall have plenty of Trading or exercise a gainful Profession.

If All the significators either in the Ascendant or Oriental quarter of heaven, and five of the Planets swift in their motion, then Promise Substance in a small compass of time after the proposal of the Question.
If Lord of the second house and of Mercury the principal thing inquired of being swift in motion, then Promise Substance in a small compass of time after the proposal of the Question.
If The distance of the Attendant from and being about two degrees, then Signify two years or thereabouts what time he had a Portion with his Wise.

If Saturn being Lord of the second house and of the seventh and the promising Planet of the thing demanded, then Shall as well shew the time When as also the performance of what he signifies(but not without some manner of obstruction ).
If Jupiter is seated on the cusp of the eleventh house, which signifies Friendship, then Augmentation of his Wealth by means of Friends.
If The Lord of the Ascendant is joined to an evil Planet, evil disposed, without reception, then The destruction of the thing queited.
If The Lord of the Ascendant is joined to an Infortune and he ill disposed, and receive him not, then The destruction of the thing queited.

If A Planet is ill disposed, when Peregrine, Retrograde, Combust, Cadent, from the Ascendant or house of the thing demanded, so that he beholds not the house, or at least the Lord of the house, in this nature the aspect to the house is better then to the Lord thereof, then The Planet is ill disposed.
If Any Planet in his Fall or Detriment, then Destroyer or Obstructor, or Planet impediting.

If The Signisicator of the Querent, or thing sought after, or Moon, or Planet to whom she is joined, whether she is a Signisicatrix, or hath participation in the Question, be joined to an unfortunate Planet, viz, Retrograde , Combust , Cadent, then Observe if Reception intervene; which if there be, it signifies the perfection of the matter, though with weariness and much solicitation.

If The Signisicator of the Querent, or thing sought after, or Moon, or Planet to whom she is joined, whether she is a Signisicatrix, or hath participation in the Question, be joined to an unfortunate Planet, viz, Retrograde , Combust , Cadent and no reception, then The matter will come to nothing, though there have been much probability of its performance.

If The Planet who receives the Lord of the Ascendant, or the Moon, or Lord of the thing Demanded, or the Planet who receives any of them, be free from misfortunes, neither receiving or received, then It perfects the matter with facility.

If The Planet to whom the Lord of the Ascendant, or the Moon, or Lord of the matter sought after, be free from the Infortunes, and is joined to any benevolent Planet who is in aspect with a malevolent, and he impedited and not receiving the former Planet, then The matter will not then be brought to perfection, or come to any good conclusion.
If Planets aspects are in reception, then Things are brought to pass, though with some trouble.
If Any Planet doe cut off the light and vertue of the Signisicators before their perfect with an evil Planet, then It hinders not, but that the matter may be perfected and accomplished.
If No abscission of light intervene, whereby the malevolence of the Infortune may be taken off, then The matter is prohibited, and will not be effected.
If Reception is by square or opposition aspect and a Planet is evil disposed, then The reception profiteth nothing; the Me when he that is received is impedited.
If Reception is by sextile or trine aspect, then You may confide the matter will be effected.
If The Planet who receives be at that time well disposed, let the reception be by any manner of aspect, then The matter is performed, Lie the aspect square or opposition.
If The aspect is trine or sextile, then It performs the thing, whether the Signisicator be received or not.
If The Signisiedtor be joined with a Fortune not impedited, then The thing will be perfected.

If Any Planet translate the light or vertue betwixt one Signisicator and another, and he to whom the light is mandated be an Infortune and impedited, then The Question or matter is destroyed, unless the Infortune be againe received.

If The Signisicator of the Querent, or the Moon, and Signisiedten of the thing looked after, be joined to any Planet who collects the light of both Planets, be he an Infortune or inform-irate, then He destroys the matter, and permits it not to be accomplished, unless himself receive both the Signisicators.
If Significator and another planet, and the planet to whom the light is mandated is an Infortune and impeded, then The question or matter is destroyed, unless the Infortune is again received.

If Significator of the Querent, or the Moon and Significator of the thing looked after, is joined to any planet who collects the light of both planets, be he an Infortune or Infortunate, then He destroys the matter, and permits it not to be accomplished, unless himself receive both the Significators; if he receive one only of them, it matters not, the matter will not be performed.
If Significator of the Querent is in the house of the thing desired, or going to conjunction of his Lord, then The Querent is going to the thing quesited after.

If Significator of the thing demanded is found in the Ascendant, or hastening to the conjunction of the Significator of the Querent, then The matter enquired of, or thing desired shall come to the Querent, receptions not with handing, the aspects remaining in their proper being.

If Cusp of the 2nd house is a fixed sign, and Jupiter is in it, and Venus in his exaltation and Angular, and Moon the dispositor of Venus, and the Moon in a firm and stable sign, then He would continue in a plentiful estate, and that the riches God should bless him withall would be permanent; he would still have a competent fortune, and not be reduced to poverty or want.
If Contrantiscion of Mars falls near to the degree of Mercury, then No great unity betwixt him and his kindred, or Brothers and Sifters.
If Mars personally in the 3rd house, and Mercury Lord of that house, disturbed by Mars' Contrantiscion, then Prejudice by Servants, or some vices or blemishes at least in their behaviour.
If Mercury in his exaltation, yet the Contrantiscion of Mars doth afflict him, then Leaves a tincture of Mars with Mercury.
If Sun Lord of the 11th, beholds Sun with a square, then Suffer also the cusp of the second house.
If Sun is Lord of the 11th, then Dehort him from engagements, or confiding in solar men, though of much friendship with him.
If Lord of the Ascendant is for him that asks the question, the Lord of the third for the Brother, Siller or Neighbour quesited after, then N/A
If Lord of the 3rd is a Benevolent Planet, then Unity and concord will be betwixt the Querent and Brother, Sifter, Neighbour or Kinfman quesited after.
If Lord of the 3rd is in the Ascendant, then Unity and concord will be betwixt the Querent and Brother, Sifter, Neighbour or Kinfman quesited after.
If A fortunate Planet is in the third, then Unity and concord will be betwixt the Querent and Brother, Sifter, Neighbour or Kinfman quesited after.

If Lord of the third and Lord of the Ascendant are in trine or sextile aspect within the orbs of either Planet, then Unity and concord will be betwixt the Querent and Brother, Sifter, Neighbour or Kinfman quesited after.
If Lord of the third and Lord of the Ascendant are in mutual reception, then Unity and concord will be betwixt the Querent and Brother, Sifter, Neighbour or Kinfman quesited after.
If Lord of the third casts his trine or sextile to the cusp of the Ascendant, then Unity and concord will be betwixt the Querent and Brother, Sifter, Neighbour or Kinfman quesited after.
If Lord of the Ascendant casts his trine or sextile to the third house, then Unity and concord will be betwixt the Querent and Brother, Sifter, Neighbour or Kinfman quesited after.

If A Fortune is in the Ascendant, then The Querent is of good condition, and that there will be no default in him, but that the deed will be in the Brother, Sifter, Neighbour, or Kinfman quesited after.

If Lord of the Ascendant beholds the cusp of the third, and the Lord of the third does not aspect either the Ascendant, or be in aspect with the Lord thereof, then The Querent is of good condition, and that there will be no default in him, but that the deed will be in the Brother, Sifter, Neighbour, or Kinfman quesited after.
If Mars, Saturn, or Uranus are locally placed in the Ascendant, then The Querent to be evilly conditioned, and the fault in him.
If Venus, Moon, or Jupiter in the third, unless in their own essential Dignities, then The Querent shall expect little good from his Brethren, Sifter, Kinred or Neighbour.

If Venus, Moon, or Jupiter in the third, Peregrine, Retrograde or Combust, or in any malevolent configuration with any other Planet, then Though at the time of the question, there is apparence of unity, yet will it not continue, but usually mortal hatred or untoward grumbling doth afterward arise.
If Saturn is in the third, or Taurus, then The Neighbours are clowns, the Kinred covetous and sparing.
If Mars is in the third, or Taurus, then The Kinred are treacherous. Neighbours thee villains.
If Saturn or Mars are out of their Dignities essentially, then The Kinred are treacherous. Neighbours thee villains.

If Ascendant and his Lord are the Querent's Signisicator, the cusp of the third house shall be the Ascendant of the Brother that is absent, the fourth the absent's house of Substance, and so in order, then N/A
If Lord of the third is in the third and the unfortunate Planets have no square or opposition aspect unto him, then The Brother is in health.
If Malignant Planets behold the Lord of the third with a square or opposition, without reception, then The Brother lives, is in health, but he is in great perplexity, discontent and sorrow.

If Malignant Planets behold the Lord of the third with a square or opposition, and be in reception, then The Brother is in great distress, but he will with ease evade it, and free himself from his present sad condition.

If Fortunate Planets behold the Lord of the third with a trine or sextile aspect, without reception, or with a square or opposition with reception, then The Brother is in good health and is well content to stay in the place where he then is.
If Fortunate Planets behold the Lord of the third with trine or sextile and with reception, then The Brother is in health, and wants nothing in this world to make him happy.

If Lord of the third is in the fourth, which is his own second house, without the aspect of the malignant Planets, then He endeavours to get an Estate or fortune in that Country wherein he is at the time of the ereanding the Scheame.

If Lord of the third is in the fifth house, and is joined with the Lord of the fifth house, with reception of a Fortune or not, as long as the Lord of the fifth house is not impeded in any grievous manner, then The absent Brother is in health, is jocund and merry, and well liketh the conversation of the men of that Country where he is.
If A Fortune with whom the Signisicator of the Brother is in conjunction with, or in trine or sextile with reception, then The Brother is in a good condition.

If Lord of the third is in the sixth void of course, or in perfect conjunction with any of the infortunate Planets, without reception, and those unfortunate Planets be themselves iropedited, then The absent Brother is indisposed in health, crazy and not contented in the place where he is.
If Brother's Signisicator in the sixth, eighth and twelfth houses, then He is not well pleased, but yet no hurt will come of it.

If Brother's Signisicator is found in the eighth house, and is either corporally or by trine or sextile aspect joined to a Fortune, then The Brother is not very well, yet not so ill, that he need any thing doubt of his wel-being; however, he is indisposed.
If Brother's Signisicator is joined to evil Planets by bad aspects, and out of the sixth house, then The absent Brother is infirme.
If Lord of the sixth is in the third, unless he have dignities in the Signe, and be in those dignities, then The absent Brother is infirme.
If Lord of the third is in conjunction with the Lord of the eighth, or is entering Combustion, then He will dye of that infirmity.
If Signisicator in the seventh, then He is in the same Country in which he went, and not yet gone out of it, he continues there as a Stranger or Sojourner, is neither well or ill, but so so.
If Signisicator is in the eighth, then He doubts himself that he shall dye.

If Signisicator is either combust, or in conjunction with the Lord of the eighth in the eighth, or in aspect by square or opposition of the Infortunes out of the eighth, then He doubts himself that he shall dye.

If Signisicator is in the ninth, then He is gone from the place to which he first went into a further Country, or if capable, he is entered into some religious Order, or is employed by those that are in Order, viz. Religious Men, or possibly according to his quality, is employed in some journey far distant from his former aboad.

If Signisicator is in the tenth, and joined by conjunction or in aspect with the fortunes by trine or sextile aspect, especially with reception, then He hath then got some employment, Office or Commission.

If Significator in the ninth house, then The person has gone to a further country or entered a religious order or is employed by religious men or is employed in a journey far distant from their former abode.

If Significator in the tenth house, joined by good aspect with the Fortunes (Jupiter, Venus), then The person has got some employment, office, or command in the country where they are, and is in good estimation and lives in a credible way.
If Significator in the tenth house, joined to the Infortunes (Saturn, Mars), then It may be feared the person is dead.
If Significator in the tenth house, in square or opposition to the Infortunes (Saturn, Mars), then It may be feared the person is dead.
If Significator in the tenth house, impeded by the Infortunes (Saturn, Mars), then It may be feared the person is dead.
If Significator combust in the tenth house, then It may be feared the person is dead.
If Significator in the eleventh house, joined to the Fortunes (Jupiter, Venus) by any good aspect, then The person is safe at the house of a friend, and is pleasant and merry.
If Significator in the eleventh house, in conjunction with the Lord of the eleventh, then The person is safe at the house of a friend, and is pleasant and merry.
If Evil planets afflict the significator in the eleventh house, then The person is malecontented and not well pleased with their present condition.
If Evil planets cast their malevolent beams unto the significator in the eleventh house, then The person is malecontented and not well pleased with their present condition.

If Significator in the twelfth house, joined to the Fortunes (Jupiter, Venus) with reception, and those Fortunes not impeded, then The person trucks for horses or great cattle, is turned grafter, or is master of a horse, an hostler, a drover of cattle, or one that drives cattle to market, according to the quality of the person inquired after.
If Significator unfortunate in the twelfth house, then The man is discontent, and doubts he shall never see his country again, and well he may, for it's probable he will die there.

If Significator in bad aspect with the Infortunes (Saturn, Mars) in the twelfth house, then The man is discontent, and doubts he shall never see his country again, and well he may, for it's probable he will die there.

If Significator in aspect with the Lord of the eighth in the twelfth house, then The man is discontent, and doubts he shall never see his country again, and well he may, for it's probable he will die there.
If Significator combust in the twelfth house, then The man is discontent, and doubts he shall never see his country again, and well he may, for it's probable he will die there.
If Significator in the first house, then The absent brother is frolic and merry, and extremely well pleased where he is, and they much love and respect him where he is.
If Significator in the second house, then It's probable the man can by no means come away; either he is detained as prisoner, or has done some such act as that he is not capable of coming away.
If Significator in the second house and retrograde, then He will make hard shift to escape whenever opportunity is offered.

If Moon in the ascendant, tenth, eleventh or third house, separated by a benevolent aspect from any planet and applying by trine or sextile to the Lord of the ascendant, then The report or rumor is true, but always tending to the good of the Parliament, let the report be good or ill.
If Moon applying to the Lord of the seventh by any good aspect, then We had the worst, and our enemies the victory.
If Moon void of course, then The news proved of no moment, usually vain or mere lies, and very soon contradicted.
If Venus and Mars in square or opposition, and neither calls their favorable trine or sextile to the degree ascending, then The news was false, and reported of purpose to affright us.

If Sun or Venus in the Ascendant, or the Moon or Jupiter in any of their essential dignities, in trine or sextile to the Lord of the eleventh, then The news is such as you or the party inquiring shall receive no detriment thereby.

If Lord of the sixth, eighth or twelfth houses in the Ascendant, then The Querent shall receive prejudice by the news he hears, if it concerns him or herself; or if it concerns the Commonwealth, some damage has happened to their Ministers or Parties.

If Lord of the sixth, eighth or twelfth houses in bad aspect to the Lord of the Ascendant, then The Querent shall receive prejudice by the news he hears, if it concerns him or herself; or if it concerns the Commonwealth, some damage has happened to their Ministers or Parties.

If Saturn or Mars retrograde in the Ascendant, then The Querent shall receive prejudice by the news he hears, if it concerns him or herself; or if it concerns the Commonwealth, some damage has happened to their Ministers or Parties.

If Saturn or Mars in an evil aspect with the Lord of the Ascendant, then The Querent shall receive prejudice by the news he hears, if it concerns him or herself; or if it concerns the Commonwealth, some damage has happened to their Ministers or Parties.

If Saturn or Mars calling their square or opposition rays to the degree ascending, then The Querent shall receive prejudice by the news he hears, if it concerns him or herself; or if it concerns the Commonwealth, some damage has happened to their Ministers or Parties.
If Lord of the Ascendant afflicted by the Infortunes (Saturn, Mars), then You must judge the contrary though he strong in the Signe wherein he is.
If Lord of the Ascendant cadent in house, then You must judge the contrary though he strong in the Signe wherein he is.

If Angles of the Figure are of fixed signs (Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius) and the Moon and Mercury in fixed signs, separating from the Infortunes (Saturn, Mars), and applying to a Fortunate planet (Jupiter, Venus), placed in any Angle, then Rumours are for the most part true.
If Angles of the fourth and tenth house are fixed, and the Moon received in them, then They will be in some sort verified.
If Either of the Fortunes (Jupiter, Venus) in the Ascendant, or the Moon unfortunate, then It's a strong argument the Rumours are false, and that they will turn rather to good then evil.

If Retrogradation of Mercury, or he any other way afflicted, or of that Planet to whom the Moon applies, or to whom Mercury applies, and above all, if either of those two be Lords of the Ascendant, then The ill Rumours shall vanish to nothing, and shall be converted to good.
If Lord of the Ascendant under the Sun's beams or combust, then The matter is kept secret, and few shall ever know the truth of them.
If A fortunate planet (Sun, Venus, Jupiter) in the Medium Coeli, or tenth house, then They come with an honest heart, and the advice they give is intended for your good.
If Moon applying to the Lord of the Ascendant, then They come with an honest heart, and the advice they give is intended for your good.
If An Infortune (Saturn, Mars) in the Medium Coeli, or tenth house, then They intend deceitfully, and are liars.
If Sign ascending is a moveable sign, and the Lord of the Ascendant, and Moon in moveable signs, then He is a treacherous fellow, and comes with deceit to entrap thee.
If Fruitful sign (Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces) on the cusp of the third house, then He has Brethren or Sifters.
If Masculine sign on the cusp of the third house, and the Lord thereof in a Masculine sign or hour, or in aspect with a Masculine Planet, then Brother or Brethren.
If Feminine sign and planet in the third house, or the Signisicators in Feminine Signs or Houses, and in conjunction or application to Feminine Planets, then Sisters.
If Third house in a fruitful sign, then The Querent has siblings.
If Third house in Gemini, Virgo, Sagittarius, then The Querent has siblings.
If Masculine sign in the third house and the lord of the third in a masculine sign or hour, or in aspect with a masculine planet, then The Querent has brothers.
If Feminine sign and planet in the third house, or the significators in feminine signs or houses, and in dexter or application to feminine planets, then The Querent has sisters.
If Lord of the third in aspect with planets, then The Querent has as many siblings as the number of planets in aspect.
If Last aspect between the lord of the third and the lord of the ascendant, then Unity among siblings or kindred can be discerned.
If Benefics in the ascendant or third house, then Unity and concord from that party.
If Benefics in the ascendant, then Unity and concord from the Querent.
If Benefics in the third house, then Unity and concord from siblings or kindred in general.

If Saturn or Mars out of their essential dignities in the third house or afflicting the third house, then Untoward and cross siblings or kindred, and no unity between them but continual discord, wrangling and jangling.

If Lord of the ascendant swift or slow in motion, or in any of the dignities of the lord of the third, or placed in the third, or in trine or sextile either with the lord of the third, or with a benevolent planet posited in the third, or if the Moon apply to the lord of the third, or to any planet posited in the third, or be in the third, or cast her trine aspect to the sign ascending or her square in signs of short ascension, in any house whatsoever, or if she be swift in motion, then The party should go on his short journey, and with good success.

If Sign of the third house, the sign wherein the lord of the third is, and wherein the Moon is, then The direction of the place where the Querent would go can be determined by which of them is strongest in essential dignities where he is. If the principal significator is in a Northern sign, then his journey is intended North, and so of the rest, with their due limitations.

If Venus, the quesited's significatrix, is not afflicted by Saturn, who is lord of the eighth in the figure, or by Mars, who is lord of the eighth as to the ascendant of the quesited, and that the separation of the Moon was good, viz from a dexter trine of Saturn, and her next application to a sextile of the Sun, upon the cusp of Medium Coeli, then The absent brother was alive and had no manner of casualty happened unto him, but was in good health.
If Venus, the significator of the absent brother, and Saturn, lord of the ascendant, apply to each other by a friendly trine, then The Querent should hear news of his brother very suddenly.
If Venus, the quesited, his significatrix, leaving Sagittarius, a Northeast sign, and entering Capricorn, a South sign, then He was in the South-east part of that County unto which he went.
If Venus was not far removed from the Ascendant but was in the Oriental quarter of Heaven, then He was not above one or two days journey from London.

If Venus was departing the sign and entering the sign Capricorn wherein she has essential dignities by Triplicity and Term, then The man was leaving the country and place where he last was, and wherein he had no Possession or Habitation .and was coming to his own house in London , wherein he had good propriety.
If Venus wanted one degree of getting out of Gemini, then He would be at home in less than one week.
If The Moon came to the body of Venus, she being then got into Capricorn to her own Terms and into her diurnal Triplicity, then He returns home the Tuesday following.
If Amicable aspect between Saturn and Venus, then These two brothers always did, and do agree lovingly.

If The Moon cadent, and in Capricorn, a sign wherein she nothing delights, then A false rumor.

If Venus Lady of the Ascendant, and our significatrix, in her Exaltation, then Good to us or our side from this report or Rumor.
If Mars, Lord of our Enemies Ascendant, viz the seventh, entering his Fall, viz Cancer, and afflicted by square of Saturn, then No benefit to our Enemies.
If The Moon separating from Mars, placed in the seventh and transferring his light and virtue to Venus, then There would come good to us or our side from this report or Rumor.
If Mars and Saturn in a square, then Our Enemies were so full of division and treason, and thwarting one anothers designs, that no good should come unto them upon this Report.

If Lord of the second and Lord of the sixth in reception, the Lord of the sixth in the second, and the Lord of the second in the sixth, then The Querent shall have a competent fortune out of the estate of his father.
If Lord of the sixth house is Retrograde, then Some part of the estate the father intends for the Querent, will be wasted or otherwise disposed of by the father.
If Lord of the sixth house in bad aspect of any malevolent planet, then Some part of the estate the father intends for the Querent, will be wasted or otherwise disposed of by the father.
If Planet impedites the Lord of the sixth by square or opposition, then See what house the planet is Lord of to determine who will persuade the father to alter his intention.
If Sun impedites the Lord of the sixth by combustion, then See what house the planet is Lord of to determine who will persuade the father to alter his intention.
If Lord of the sixth disposes of Venus and is in the Ascendant or second, then The Querent shall obtain his desires which he expects from his father.
If Jupiter or Venus out of the sixth house cast their benevolent aspects to any planet in the Querent's second, then It argues the same.

If Moon separates from the Lord of the sixth, and either has presently after a trine or sextile to the Lord of the second, or of the ascendant, then It shows strong and assured hopes of acquiring the thing demanded of the father.

If An Infortune in the fourth, not having Dignities there, then The father has little list to part with his money, nor will it be good to move him much, until that unfortunate planet be transited out of that sign.

If Unfortunate planet in the fourth is Direct, swift in motion, Oriental, and in trine or sextile with Jupiter or Venus or with the Lord of the ascendant, then Then let the father be moved in the business.

If Lord of the second and of the sixth, applying by Retrogradation to any good aspect, then The Querent will receive some estate from his father suddenly, ere he be aware, or when he least thinks of it.

If Lord of the fourth be in the seventh, and be a good planet, and the Lord of the first and seventh be good planets, or strong in that part of Heaven where they are, or in the whole Figure, if they be Direct, and of swift motion, and in aspect with good planets, then It is good then to abide still and not remove from the place where the Querent is.
If Lord of the seventh be with a good planet, and the Lord of the fourth with an evil one, then It is then not good to stay, for if he does, he shall receive much damage there.

If Lord of the ascendant did lately separate from the square or opposition of the Lord of the sixth, eighth or twelfth, and the Moon also did concur in Judgment, viz. if she did separate from any evil aspect of the Infortunes, they being Lords of either the seventh or fourth, then Advise the Querent to remove his habitation.
If Infortune in the ascendant, Peregrine or Retrograde, then Advise the Querent to remove his habitation.
If Peregrine or unfortunate planet was in the fourth, then Advise the Querent to remove his habitation.
If Lord of the second was weak or ill posited, then Advise the Querent to remove his habitation.

If Lord of the sixth house in the ascendant, or afflicting the Lord of the ascendant, then Judged he had his health very bad there, was sickly, or was tormented with ill servants, by whose means he did not thrive in his Vocation.
If Lord of the twelfth afflicted the Lord of the ascendant or the Moon, then Said he had backbiting, evil or slanderous neighbours, or people that lived not very far from him did scandalize him.

If Lord of the second was unfortunate, or in square or opposition to the Lord of the ascendant, or if Saturn was in the twelfth eighth or sixth, then Judged he went back in the world, and his estate consumed.
If Lord of the ascendant was afflicted by the Lord of the tenth, then Acquainted him, his reputation was lost, his trade decayed, or had no trading.

If Lord of the fourth was unfortunate, or the fourth house itself, then Judged the house was unlucky, and few that had lived therein did thrive, or that the repairs of the house had much weakened him.
If Lord of the seventh afflicted the Lord of the ascendant or second, then His overthwart neighbours did all the trade, were better furnished with commodities.

If Jupiter Direct, swift in Motion, Oriental, and the Moon in the third, eleventh or sixth house, without any aspect either good or evil to Saturn, then The work that is to be undertaken will have good success, be brought to a good conclusion, and that the Querent will have prosperity and credit by it, and the matter easily performed.

If Moon applies to that planet who is Lord of that sign wherein she is, and he receive her in any of his Dignities, then The work that is to be undertaken will have good success, be brought to a good conclusion, and that the Querent will have prosperity and credit by it, and the matter easily performed.

If Moon in motion, oriental, in the third, eleventh or fifth house, without any aspect to Saturn, then The work undertaken will have good success, be brought to a good conclusion, and the querent will have prosperity and credit by it, and the matter easily performed.

If Moon applies to the planet who is lord of the sign where the Moon is, and he receive her in any of his dignities, then The work undertaken will have good success, be brought to a good conclusion, and the querent will have prosperity and credit by it, and the matter easily performed.

If The planet who is receiver of the Moon is a fortune, and is amending in his latitude, and in a fixed sign, then The querent shall not need to fear, but that there will be water enough, and that it will run plentifully, and the water-course will long continue.
If Jupiter or Venus in the tenth house, especially Jupiter, then The river, channel, conduit, pipe, or water-work shall remain many a year.

If Saturn in the eleventh house, very strong and potent, and the Moon in trine or sextile to him, and the dispositor of the Moon in a fixed sign, or a common one, or the Moon herself in one of those signs producing rain (Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces), then In the work you are in hand with, you shall have a good current, and plenty of water.

If An unfortunate planet in the tenth house, then Your pipes will break, your water-course be subject to ruptures or breaking down of the banks, the water will not run currently, that the plot is ill laid, nor is there any success promised to the undertaker or undertakers, by that present employment.
If Lord of the second and of the fourth in angles, then The plate is still in the house, or in the ground, and not removed.
If These planets (Lord of the second and fourth) not in angles, but an infortune, without dignities, be either in the fourth or seventh, then Either part of it, or all removed and made away.
If Venus, Moon, or Jupiter in the fourth house, then There's then probability of treasure being there.

If Venus, Moon, or Jupiter in the fourth house and in their own houses, then The matter is without dispute, and you may be sure there is treasure, or something of value in the house or ground suspected.
If Saturn or Mars in any of their own houses, direct, and without impediment, and in the fourth, then There is also treasure.
If Moon in Cancer in the fourth, not laboring with any misfortune, then It's probable there is treasure there.

If Planet who signifies the treasure applies to the lord of the ascendant, or if there be mutual reception or translation, or collation of light and nature betwixt them, then It's probable the querent shall obtain the matter sought after.
If The aspect be by square or opposition, then Not without difficulty and much labor.

If Sun is in the ascendant, and also his lord or dispositor, then Promises acquisition of the treasure.

If Lord of Moon be cadent, and both the Lights, especially the Moon, and have no aspect to the Sun, or the lord of the ascendant behold not the ascendant, then I can give the querent then no hopes of obtaining the treasure or thing hid.

If In the ascendant, or in any angle a fortune, then There is treasure in the ground, and that the thing hid is still in the ground, the quantity, price, esteem thereof, shall be according to the potency, virtue or debility of the fortune.

If Lord of the 5th house in the Ascendant or 1st house, then Judge the first year
If Lord of the 5th in the 2nd house, then Judge the second year
If Lord of the 5th in the 10th house, then Judge the third year
If Lord of the 5th in the 7th, then Judge the fourth year
If Lord of the 5th house in the Ascendant or 1st house, then The first year will bring a child.
If Lord of the 5th house in the 2nd house, then The second year will bring a child.
If Lord of the 5th house in the 10th house, then The third year will bring a child.
If Lord of the 5th house in the 7th house, then The fourth year will bring a child.
If Lord of the 5th house in the 4th house, then The fifth year will bring a child.
If Lord of the 5th house in a moveable sign, then The time of childbirth is hastened.
If Lord of the 5th house in a double-bodied sign, then The time of childbirth is not manifest soon.
If Lord of the 5th house in a fixed sign, then The time of childbirth is prolonged.
If Significator is swift in motion and direct, then The matter is accomplished sooner.

If Fortunate planets behold the Ascendant, and the Lord of the Ascendant is in the Ascendant, or in the tenth, eleventh or fifth House, and Venus is well placed together with that Planet who is Lord of the Triplicity ascending, and he be not Combust or Retrograde, then The man may have children, or is capable of getting them.
If Lord of the Ascendant is in the 4th or 7th house, and Venus in a good House of heaven, then The party shall have a child a long time after the asking of the question.

If The Ascendant afflicted, or infortunated by the Malevolent Planets, and the Lord of the Ascendant in an evil place or House of heaven, and Venus Cadent, or in the 8th or Combust, or not fully elongated from the Sun-beams, then He will have few children, and they sickly, hardly any to live.
If Moon is unfortunate, then Great sign of non conception, or no capacity to conceive.
If A fortunate Planet in the 5th House, or having a benigne aspect to the Cusp thereof, then Gives hopes and strong testimony of having a child in a little compass of time.
If An infortune in the 5th ill dignified, Combust, Retrograde, slow of motion, then The Querent will have no children.
If An infortune in the 5th direct and swift, Orientally and in any of his essential dignities, then He shall signify children.
If Venus, Jupiter, or Mercury in or aspecting the infortune out of good houses, then More children.
If A Fortune is near to the Ascendant, then The sooner the Querent may expect children.
If A Fortune is remote to the Ascendant, then The longer time must be allowed for children.
If Jupiter in the Ascendant or 5th, and in a Sign which is not barren, then The Querent may have a child.
If Lord of the house is angular with reception of the Lord of that Angle where he Is, or in the eleventh or fifth with the like reception, then Sure testimony of having Children.
If Lord of the Ascendant or the Moon be joined to the Lord of the 5th, then He or she shall have Issue by the party inquired of.
If Translation from the Lord of the 5th to the Lord of the ascendant, then Argument of having Children after some space of time.
If Lord of the ascendant or the Moon be in the 5th House, then He or she may have children.
If Lord of the 5th in the ascendant, then He or she may have children.

If Lord of the ascendant, the Moon, and Lord of the 5th be joined to a Planet more ponderous then themselves, then He collecting both their lights, shall be the receiver of their disposition, and shall signify whether the Child or Children (if any be) shall live or not.
If The receiver is not impeded, then The Children then shall live.
If The receiver is Retrograde, Combust, Peregrine, or otherwise unfortunate, then Neither will the Children live long, or will the Parents take comfort of these Children.

If Venus in the ascendant, third, fifth, ninth or eleventh house, free from all manner of misfortune, then The Woman shall shortly conceive, perhaps upon the first congress or coition after the asking of the question, or a little after, and the matter seems as good as done.
If Venus in the 5th noway impedited, and some other Fortune be there besides, then It hastens the time, and she will conceive very suddenly.
If Venus in the aforesaid places impedited, then Either she is not conceived, or if she be, it will not come to perfection, for the Woman shall suffer abortion.

If Venus unfortunate by Saturn or Mars, or be under the Sun beames, or Combust, then The Woman is not conceived, unless a Fortune be in the 5th house, and then she is more assuredly with childe, or shall be shortly; yet you may justly feare she will suffer mischance ere the birth.

If Either Saturn or Mars, or especially the South Node be in the 5th, or the two former malevolents cast their quartile to the 5th, then It seemes the Woman is not with childe; and verily the quartile of the Infortunes to the 5th house seems to hinder conception.
If Lord of the ascendant or Moon behold the Lord of the 5th with any aspect or translation, then She is with child.
If Lord of the ascendant and the Moon be in the 5th house free from the malevolent aspect of the Infortunes and direct, then She is with child.
If Lord of the 6th, 8th or 12th in aspect to the Lord of the 5th or Lord of the ascendant, or the Moon, then Affliction.
If Venus generally in the first, fifth, eleventh or seventh, not in aspect to Saturn or Mars, they being slow in motion or Retrograde, then She is with child.
If Lord of the ascendant or Lord of the 5th house aspecting a Planet in an Angle with reception, and rendring up his vertue unto him, then She is with child.
If The Moon be in reception with any Planet in an Angle, that is, essentially Fortified, then She is with child.
If Lord of the Ascendant behold the Ascendant with an amicable aspect, out of any good House, then She is with child.
If The Moon be in the seventh, and behold the Lord of the seventh in the eleventh, then She is with child.
If The Moon be in the eleventh, and behold the Lord of the seventh in the seventh, then She is with child.

If The Lord of the Ascendant received in either House, Triplicity or Exaltation, and the receiver or the Lord of the Ascendant having alike dignity in the House, Triplicity, Exaltation, or Term, of the received, viz. Lord of the Ascendant, then She is with child.
If The Moon giving vertue, or rendring her light to a Planet in the 5th house, or having essentiall dignities in the 5th, then She is with child.
If The Moon applying to the Lord of the ascendant or Lord of the 5th in the 1st or 10th House, and he not Cadent from his owne House or exaltation, then She is with child.
If The dispositor of the Moon and Lord of the hour in Angles, then She is newly conceived.
If Saturn in the 7th, then The party is quicke, or her Infant moveth.
If Jupiter in the 7th, then She is impregnated of a male childe.
If Mars in the 7th, then She is with childe of a Girle.
If The Moon in the 5th applying to Venus or Jupiter, then Argue the same.
If The Sign ascending be fixed, and a Fortune therein placed, or the Lord of the 5th strong in the ascendant or tenth House, then You may ever predict true Conception.
If The Lord of the 5th behold a Planet in an Angle with reception, or if the Lord of the Hour, Lord of the 5th, Sun, Moon, Venus or Jupiter be in the 5th Fortunate, then She is with child.
If The Lord of the sixth house beholds a planet in an angle with reception, then True conception
If The Lord of the hour, Lord of the sixth, Jupiter, Venus, or Moon is in the sixth house and fortunate, then True conception
If The Lord of the sixth house is in the seventh house, then True conception
If The Lord of the seventh house is in the sixth house, then True conception
If Saturn or Mars is impeded, then No conception or danger of abortion
If Moon is joined to Saturn or Mars, then No conception or danger of abortion
If Saturn or Mars are combust, then No conception or danger of abortion
If Saturn or Mars are retrograde, then No conception or danger of abortion
If Saturn or Mars are slow in motion, then No conception or danger of abortion
If Saturn or Mars are in Scorpio, Sagittarius, or Capricorn in the sixth house, then No conception or danger of abortion
If Saturn or Mars are in square or opposition to the Lord of the sixth house, then No conception or danger of abortion
If The Lord of the ascendant is joined to a retrograde planet, then Negative outcome (judge by major testimonies)
If The Lord of the ascendant is in a cadent house, then Negative outcome (judge by major testimonies)
If The Lord of the ascendant is received by a retrograde planet, then Negative outcome (judge by major testimonies)
If The Lord of the ascendant is received by a combust planet, then Negative outcome (judge by major testimonies)
If There is no aspect or translation of light between the Lord of the sixth and the Lord of the ascendant, then Negative outcome (judge by major testimonies)
If The Lord of the ascendant, Lord of the sixth, Lord of the hour are masculine, and the Moon is in a masculine sign, degrees, or quarter, then Male child
If The Lord of the sixth is retrograde, combust, or cadent from house or exaltation, then Presage of death
If The Lord of the ascendant, Lord of the hour, Lord of the sixth are all or most of them unfortunate, then Argument of death
If Saturn or Mars in the first or sixth house, and retrograde, then Argument of death

If The sign ascending is common, and a fortunate planet is in it, or the sixth or first house, and Sun and Moon in common signs, or the sign of the sixth is common, and Lord of the sixth in a common sign, then Twins
If The Lord of the ascendant is in the sixth house, then The woman is conceived with child
If The Lord of the sixth is in the ascendant, then The woman is conceived with child
If The Lord of the ascendant his virtue or disposition is translated to any planet in an angle, then The woman is conceived with child
If The planet to whom the Lord of the ascendant commits his disposition is in a cadent house, then The woman has taken grief, and it's more like to be a sickness
If The ascendant is Aries, Taurus, Sagittarius, or Capricorn, then If conception should hold, it will come to no good end
If Any of the malevolent planets are in an angle, then If conception should hold, it will come to no good end
If Saturn or Mars are usually in the sixth house, then Abortion
If Saturn or Mars are in the ascendant, then Extreme scare and mistrust of abortion

If The ponderous planet to whom the Lord of the ascendant commits his disposition is in a good house (second, eleventh, or ninth), not in with the Infortunes, and the Moon is free, then The conception shall come to a good end, and the woman safely delivered

If The Lord of the sixth, who is natural significator of children, is in the ascendant free from misfortune, viz. Retrogradation or Combustion, or not with Saturn or Mars, then The conception shall come to a good end, and the woman safely delivered

If Either Gemini or Virgo is ascending, then both Venus and Jupiter are in the sign ascending, or in the sign of the sixth, or be in any of the twelve signs (except Aries), then It’s probable she goes with two children
If The Moon is with Venus and Jupiter in the ascendant or sixth, then It's possible she may have three
If Three planets cast their trine or sextile to the degree ascending, or to the cusp of the sixth house, then It's also probable she may conceive, or is with child with more than one

If A fixed sign possesses the ascendant or sixth house, or any moveable signs, and the Sun and Moon be therein, viz. either in fixed or moveable signs, and in the sixth or first house, then It's a certain argument the woman is with child but with one
If The signs of the ascendant and sixth are Aries, Gemini, Leo, Libra, Sagittarius, or Aquarius, then Male child
If The signs of the ascendant and sixth are Taurus, Cancer, Virgo, Scorpio, Capricorn, or Pisces, then Female child

If The Lord of the ascendant is in a masculine sign, and the Lord of the sixth in a feminine sign, then have recourse to the Moon, and see what sign she is in, and if she apply to a planet in a masculine sign, then see gives her testimony to that significator who is in a masculine sign, then Boy or man-child
If Venus is oriental of the Sun, then Venus is reputed masculine
If Venus is occidental of the Sun, then Venus is reputed feminine

If The Moon, the Lord of the sixth, and the Lord of the hour, see which of all these is nearest from the separation of any planet, and well consider him, and from what manner of aspect this separation is; if he be separated by a trine aspect, then She is in the fifth month of her conception, or the third

If The Moon, the Lord of the sixth, and the Lord of the hour, see which of all these is nearest from the separation of any planet, and well consider him, and from what manner of aspect this separation is; if the aspect was a sextile, then She is in the second or sixth month of her conception

If The Moon, the Lord of the sixth, and the Lord of the hour, see which of all these is nearest from the separation of any planet, and well consider him, and from what manner of aspect this separation is; if the separation was by a square aspect, then She is in the fourth of her conception

If The Moon, the Lord of the sixth, and the Lord of the hour, see which of all these is nearest from the separation of any planet, and well consider him, and from what manner of aspect this separation is; if it was by an opposition, then She hath been conceived seven months

If The Moon, the Lord of the sixth, and the Lord of the hour, see which of all these is nearest from the separation of any planet, and well consider him, and from what manner of aspect this separation is; if it were by a conjunction, then Then she hath been conceived one month

If When Mars and Venus are in conjunction with the Lord of the sixth, and with the Moon and Lord of the hour, or the more part of them, and, that time of their conjunction shall show the hour of birth, then The time of their conjunction shall show the hour of birth

If When the Part of Fortune shall apply to that Quarter of Heaven where the Part of Children is, and direct that Part of Children by the ascensions to the degree of the sixth house, and to the degree of Jupiter, and to his aspect, especially if Jupiter be between the Part of Children and the sixth house, because when that Part doth apply it self to the degrees of ascensions, and when it is within the Orbes of those degrees, then Is the time of delivery, giving to every degree one day
If The Signisicator of the Question doth change his form, viz. when he removes out of one Signe into another, then Then is also like to be the time of the Birth

If Behold the Lord of the sixth, how far he is removed from the cusp of the sixth, and give to every sign one month, then Help yourself with your other testimonies, and judge according to the major part of those Signisicators that do most nearly concur
If The major part of the Signisicators be in Diurnal Signs, then The Birth will be by day
If The major part of the Signisicators be in Nocturnal Signs, then The Birth will be by night

If The Lord of the sixth, the Moon the Lord of the Hour, and the Part of Children before mentioned, and his Dispositor; if the major part hereof be in Masculine Signs, then It's a Male the Woman goes with, and the birth will be by day
If The Lord of the sixth, the Moon the Lord of the Hour, and the Part of Children before mentioned, and his Dispositor; if the testimonies be equal, then The birth will be by twilight

If Consider the Lord of the Ascendant, Lord of the sixth, and Dispositor of the Moon, and the Moon herself; if any application be betwixt these planets, and the Moon be in a common sign, and the Ascendant one, and the Signisicators in Angles, then She is with child

If Ascendant free, and the Lord of the Ascendant neither separated from a bad aspect of the Lord of the eighth or fourth, or applying to any bad aspect of the Lords of those two houses, then I never doubted the life of the Mother
If Moon fortunately applying to either of the Father, or to the Sun, or indeed to any good aspect of the Infortunes, then I never doubted the life of the Mother

If Lord of the fifth in the eighth, and had no essential dignities in the Sign, and had any aspect good or ill to the Lord of the eighth or fourth, then I usually judged the Infant would not live long after the Birth
If Infant borne upon the very change of the Moon, then He dyes shortly, seldom outlives the next full Moon
If He or she be borne at the moment of the full Moon, then It is very probable the Infant dyes upon the next new Moon
If Both these at the time of birth are either of themselves, or by the Infortunes afflicted, then Neither doe I beleeve any life can be permanent

If Lord of the ascendant, the Moon, the Lord of the fifth; reception and application betwixt the Lord of the fifth and Lord of the ascendant, and this in the tenth, eleventh, fifth, third, ninth, first or second houses, then There will be Love and Unity betwixt them
If Venus or Jupiter doe behold the cusps of both houses, then There will be Unity and Concord betwixt them

If Mars or Saturn be in the fifth, then That the Childe will be untoward, very andverse, and not easily regulated by his Parents directions, and that the fault is wholly in the Child, or young Man or Maidy according to the Question propounded

If Those two Planets, or any Planet who is posited in the house be Peregrine, then That the Childe will be untoward, very andverse, and not easily regulated by his Parents directions, and that the fault is wholly in the Child, or young Man or Maidy according to the Question propounded
If Mars or Saturn in the ascendant, then The fault is their owne, that the Child is not more observant unto them
If Jupiter be there, then They are too much lordly over him or her, or their Children, and over-awe them, and keep them in too much sujeandton

If Saturn be the Planet impediting, then They are too ausiere, dogged, and too much dole silled and expert more service, duty, obedience or attendance from them then is sitting In a Christian liberty, that they give their Children no encouragement,or shew them any countenance

If Mars be there in the ascendant, then He is too too jealous, and too inisirusifull of the actions of his or their Children, that he beleeves lyes and calumnies against his or their Children, that simple people foole him in his humour, and besot him with vain reports
If The Lord of the fifth, then Shall represent the person of the Embassador

If The Planet who is received, or who colleands or translates the vertue of one to another, be Lord of the eleventh, then He comes to renew the League of Friendship betwixt the two Nations

If The Lord of the fifth be unfortunate in the seventh, and the Lord of the ascendant and he be in square or opposition, and Saturn have any malicious aspects to them both, or to either of them, then There is then no likelihood of Unity, or to be any content in the Embassage to be delivered, or both parties will find trivial means to discontent one another, so that no solid peace may be expeanded from any act performed or to be performed by this Treaty or Embassage, rather probability of falling at varience

If The Lord of the fifth house, and from that aspect he shall cast to the ascendant or Lord thereof, or to the Lord of the eleventh, then Whether the Embassador will deale fairly or prove false, or shuffle in his Undertakings, you must know that judgment from the well or ill affection

If The Significator of the Embassador have any trine or sextile aspect (or be he well dignified or not) either to the Lord of the ascendant, or Lord of that Signe under which the Kingdome you are in is subject, then The Embassador himselfe wishes well to the Kingdome, and will performe his trust with much sincerity

If The Moon is in a moveable sign, then Expect quick dispatch.
If The Moon is in a common or double-bodied sign, then The disease will not be very difficult to cure, but somewhat long in curing.

If The Moon is separated from a malevolent, weak planet (that is ill dignified) and is applying to a Fortune powerfully strong, then The sick party will be restored to former health.
If Mars is oriental of the Sun, and significator of the disease, it proceeding from cold, then The patient will recover.

If Saturn is occidental, then Saturn is unlucky.

If The conjunction of the Moon with Mars is dangerous, then It is an argument of a strong sickness at hand.

If The Lord of the ascendant happens to be a benevolent planet, and placed in the first, tenth, eleventh, fifth, or third house, being no way endangered by the opposition or square configuration of the malevolents, then It prenotes sanity.

If The position of the Fortunes in the Midheaven or first house, at what time the sickness shall afflict the sick person, then Nothing is a more sure argument of health, or that the party sick shall live.
If The Sun or Moon is in the ascendant of the question, not any ways damaged by the hateful aspect of the Lord of the eighth or sixth, then The party sick shall live.

If The Moon is in her own house, or in the house of Jupiter or Venus, and there in either of their aspect, free from any ill aspect of Saturn or Mars, then She signifies health and life.
If The Moon is in conjunction with Jupiter, then It denotes good.

If The Moon shall be well aspected and posited in a succeeding house, provided she be increasing in light and motion, and not near the bodies of Mars or Saturn, or infected with their rays, then Safety is also to be expected.

If The Moon is either in the first, tenth, eleventh, ninth, second, third, or fifth house, in trine or sextile with the Lord of the ascendant, or with his antiscion, yea, if he be a malevolent planet, so that neither the Lord of the ascendant or the Moon have any other impediment, then It does argue life.

If At the first falling sick of the infirm body, the Moon is void of course, and at her next crisis meets with a trine or sextile of Jupiter or Venus, in that very degree which makes a perfect crisis, then The sick shall recover, be he never so much pained or grieved at the time of demanding the question or access of the urine.

If The benevolent planets are more potent than the malevolent, then They give assured hopes of life, and invite the infirm person to consider of his escape.

If Those signs which are adverse in a nativity are the signs of the sixth, seventh, eighth, and twelfth houses, then N/A

If One gets an hot disease in the hour of Mars, then He will be infinitely oppressed.
If One gets a cold disease in the hour of Saturn, then He will be infinitely oppressed.

If The Lord of the ascendant and of the Figure Combust, unless there be some reception between the Sun and them, such a chance happening, and the Moon proving fortunate, after some small hope remains, then Undoubtedly declare death.
If The Lord of the ascendant and the Moon in conjunction with the Lord of the eighth, without the interposing aspects of the Fortunes, then Threatens death.

If The application of the Moon to a planet in the eighth, then Is always dangerous.
If The application of the Lord of the ascendant unto the Lord of the eighth or unto malevolent planets therein, the Moon being any manner of way corrupt, then Denotes death.
If The Moon transferring the light and influence of the Lord of the ascendant to the Lord of the eighth, then Brings usually death.
If The Lord of the eighth is in the ascendant, the Lord of the ascendant and the Moon being both afflicted, then It also proves fatal.
If The Lord of the ascendant is infortunate in the eighth, the Moon being then corrupted or very weak, and in no essential dignity, then It also proves fatal.

If The Lord of the ascendant is corporally joined with the Lord of the fourth, sixth, seventh, or twelfth, then It seldom succeeds well with the sick person then.

If Mars in fire signs (Aries, Leo, Sagittarius), then signifies hectic fevers
If Mars in Cancer or Pisces, then disease grows from some cold and moist cause or matter
