If Saturn in fixed signs (Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius), then afflicts the patient with durable and long continued agues and fevers, pectoral rottennesses, or dry coughs, the joint gout, leprosy, or general scabbiness all over the body, all manner of gouts
If Mars in mutable signs (Aries and Sagittarius), then general flux of humours all-over the body, principally the dropsy or tympanicall humours
If Mars in common signs, then the disease proceeds not from the disaffection of one humour alone, but has many changings, receding and reverting, and yet the disease continues a long time

If Mars is the author of the sickness, then demonstrates ill affection of the liver, and a corruption of the blood either by inflammation, or other causes of nature agreeable to the sign wherein he is posited
If Mars in Cancer or Pisces, then the blood is waterish, or too thin
If Mars in Aries, Leo, or Sagittarius, then the blood is overheated by some extravagant excess of heat or choler
If Mars in Taurus or Libra, then the blood overflows, there's too much, breathing of a vein is necessary or sweating
If Mars in Virgo or Scorpio, then the blood is infected with melancholy, too gross, and not fluent
If Mars in fiery signs, then causes fevers proceeding from blood, yet without rottenness or store of putrisaction
If Mars joined with the Sun, then denotes a distempered fever procreated by putrisaction of the blood
If Mars is significator of the disease and in fiery signs affixing the luminaries or the Ascendant or Lord of the Ascendant, then procreates hot burning fevers, some mixture of melancholy

If Saturn is mixed in the judgement, that is, if he have anything to do in the signification of the disease, or Mars in any of his dignities, then procreates hot burning fevers, some mixture of melancholy
If Mars in common signs, then the disease will not easily be discovered, it will come and go, and be at no certainty
If Mars in common signs and Saturn in aspect with good planets, then the disease will quite go away
If Saturn with the Lord of the eighth or sixth, then the sick may expect death
If Mars in common signs, then the patient is vexed with many infirmities and they accite, returning when expectation is of amendment

If Mars under the beams of the Sun in the sixth or twelfth, in fiery signs, then brings scorching or burning inflaming fevers, that is, fevers exceeding, specially in heat, and as it were boiling the blood
If Mars being the cause of a fever and in Taurus, then shows ebolition or a boiling of the humours, continual burning fevers whose original cause springs from the great veins near the heart
If The Moon at first lying down of the sick party, is in square or opposition of Saturn or in Saturn his antiscion, then the disease then afflicting is merely melancholy
If The Moon afflicted of or by Mars, with the aforesaid aspects, then the disease is from choler

If Venus being signisicatrix of the disease, then shows it proceeds of intemperancy, too much gluttony of some surfeit, disaffection in the belly, or in or near the privy parts, or by some womanish trick
If Venus in fiery signs, then shows a fever but of one day's continuance
If Mars join in signification with Venus in fiery signs, then notes rotten fevers arising from phlegm

If Jupiter is unfortunate and is author of the disease, then the sick party has his brain disaffected, is disturbed with an unquiet fancy or mind, with a frenzy, falling-sickness, cough, ptisick, or the like
If The Lord of the ninth is in the sixth, then the disease is from some poison, witchery, or fascination, charm, or by or from some occult cause
If The Lord of the sixth unfortunate or afflicted above the earth (12th, 11th, 10th, 9th, 8th, 7th houses), then the disease is in the right side of the body, and in the upper part thereof

If The Lord of the sixth under the earth (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 6th houses) or vitiated in a diurnal sign, then the disease is in the superior and fore-part of the body, as in the sore-head, stomach
If The Lord of the sixth under the earth (1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th, 6th houses) or vitiated in a nocturnal sign, then the infirmity is in the back part of the body
If The Signisicator of the disease be in a feminine sign, and in aspect to a feminine planet in a feminine sign or house, then the disease is in the left side of the body
If The Lord of the sixth is a masculine planet and above the earth, then the right side of the sick is pained
If The Signisicator is in few degrees of the sign, then the upper part of that member is pained or grieved
If The Signisicator is in the middle of the sign, then the middle part of the member is distressed
If The Signisicator possesses the lower degrees of the sign, then the lower part of the member is distressed
If The sign ascending, the Moon, and the Lord of the house wherein the Sun is, are all vitiated or afflicted, then the disease is then through the whole body, or no place is free

If Those planets who dispose of the Sun and Moon, or he that is Lord of the Ascendant, or two of them at least be afflicted, then the disease is in the spirits together with some indisposition of mind
If The Ascendant, Moon and Lord of the House of the Sun are all or but two of them impeded, then the infirmity rests in the mind but not in the body
If The Ascendant and the Moon are both unfortunate, and the Lord of the Ascendant and Dispositor of the Moon free, then the indisposition is in the mind and not in the body
If Saturn naturally foreshows or causes melancholy, then all manner of distempers from melancholy; and by consequence the disturbed mind

If Saturn Lord of the Ascendant or of the hour, or twelfth house, or sixth, or if the Moon separate from him, or if Saturn be in the sixth house, or in the Ascendant, or in square or opposition of the Lord of the Ascendant, then the sick-party labours with some affliction of mind, or with some vexatious care wherewith his mind is much troubled
If The Lord of the House of the Moon and of the Ascendant are unfortunate by the Sun, or combust, or under his beams, then the infirmity is bodily

If That planet who rules the signs wherein the Lord of the Ascendant is in, and he who is Dispositor of the Moon be unfortunate in their fall, detriment or otherwise very much afflicted, then the disease raises more in the mind than in the body
If A planet in the Ascendant, or the Ascendant, or if the Lord of the House of the Moon be oppressed in the twelfth by a square or opposition of Mars, then the disease is both in body and mind

If A planet being by nature malevolent, beholding the Ascendant and not the Moon, and together with this, if the Lord of the Sign where the Sun is be afflicted, then the party is grieved in mind, but not sick in his body
If The degree ascending and degree of that sign wherein the Moon is be more afflicted than the Lords of those signs, then the disease ranges more in the mind than body

If The Lords of the places of the Moon and of the Sun be in their detriments, falls, or Peregrine, Retrograde, Combust, and the degree ascending in square of the Moon; and free from the ill aspects of Saturn and Mars, then the patient is vexed with a tormented soul
If The Sun, the Lord of the Ascendant, or hour, or of the twelfth house are signisicators of the party inquiring, then these show a mind vexed with haughtiness, vain-glory, self-conceitedness, pride
If Venus, then argues venery, a lascivious desire to women, wherewith both body and mind are disturbed
If Jupiter shows doating fancies, and fearful imaginations, wheresoever you find him a Signisicator and afflicted, then doating fancies, and fearful imaginations
If Lord of the Ascendant, hour, or twelfth house are significators of the party inquiring, then a mind vexed with haughtiness, vain-glory, self-conceitedness, and pride
If Venus is a significator, then lascivious desire to women, wherewith both body and mind are disturbed
If Mercury is afflicted and a significator, then doating fancies and fearful imaginations
If Mercury is afflicted and a significator, then stirred to mistrust upon vain scares, his own jealous fancies, or upon some flying reports
If the degrees wherein the Lord of the Ascendant, Sun or Moon at time of the birth fall to be the degrees of a sign wherein a present eclipse is at time of the sickness, then unfortunate
If the degrees wherein the Lord of the Ascendant, Sun or Moon at time of the birth fall to be the degrees of a sign wherein a great conjunction is at time of the sickness, then unfortunate
If The sign of the eclipse falling in any of the angles of the nativity, then very dangerous
If The sign of a great conjunction falling in any of the angles of the nativity, then very dangerous
If The sign of the eighth house of the yearly revolution of the world falling in any of the angles of the nativity, then very dangerous
If A sign ascends upon the first falling sick, or demand of the patient, wherein an infortune was in the nativity, then fearfully torments the sick party
If A sign ascends upon the first falling sick, or demand of the patient, wherein an infortune was in the nativity, then he shall have a hard fit of sickness
If conjunction of the Moon with the Sun, not above 6 degrees distance between them, and the Moon not yet passed by the Sun, then a very ill sign
If Sun and Moon being in conjunction in Taurus or Scorpio, then this misfortune is lessened
If Moon is twelve degrees from the Sun, then she shows little danger of the crisis, or dies critically
If Moon is in good aspect with a benevolent planet, then promise ease, and a better condition in the disease
If Moon meet with an ill aspect of the Lord of the eighth, then the patient will be worse, his pain increase, and the medicine do little good
If Moon meet with an ill aspect of the Lord of the sixth, then the patient will be worse, his pain increase, and the medicine do little good

If Moon came to square or opposition of that planet who did any ways afflict either the ascendant, the Lord of the ascendant or the Moon, then the Patient to be much distempered, the Disease high, and Medicines given about those times to work little or no good effect

If Moon came to square or opposition of that planet who did any ways afflict the Lord of the sixth, then the Patient to be much distempered, the Disease high, and Medicines given about those times to work little or no good effect

If Moon came to square or opposition of that planet who did any ways afflict any planet that was posited in the sixth, then the Patient to be much distempered, the Disease high, and Medicines given about those times to work little or no good effect
If Moon to come to a trine or sextile of the Lord of the ascendant, then pronounce to the infirmed, comfort, and some relaxation or an intervall of ease
If Moon to come to a trine or sextile of the Lord of the eleventh, then pronounce to the infirmed, comfort, and some relaxation or an intervall of ease
If Moon to come to a trine or sextile of the Lord of the ninth, then pronounce to the infirmed, comfort, and some relaxation or an intervall of ease
If Moon to come to a trine or sextile of the Lord of the tenth, then pronounce to the infirmed, comfort, and some relaxation or an intervall of ease
If Lord of the ascendant came to any good aspect of the Sun (if he had not power or dominion in the disease), then sound the Patient’s mind much enlightened
If aspect between Lord of the ascendant and a benevolent planet is in moveable signs, then the party will amend in so many days
If Significators are swift in motion, angular, then determine the party will amend in so many days more certainly
If application is in common signs, then neither judge months, weeks or days

If Lord of the ascendant moves out of the sign he is in at the time of the question, and hath essential dignities in the sign he is going into, then the party recovers then, or sensibly feels an alteration for good in himself
If the later degrees of a sign are on the cusp of the sixth, viz, 28 degrees, and the sign common, then the disease will vary in less time then two weeks

If The Moon is separated from a planet and applies to another, with the Moon in square or opposition to a malefic planet, or in conjunction with a malefic planet, then The disease will extend almost to death
If The Moon is in configuration with the benefics, then The sick will obtain remedy more speedily
If The Moon is swift in motion and increasing in light, then The sick will obtain remedy more speedily

If The Moon after her conjunction with the Sun, when she begins to grow great, and as it were, to swell with the increase of light and motion, shall be amissed by the square or opposition of a malefic, before she come to conjunction of the Sun, and no intervening aspect of a benevolent planet change between, then Mortal and pernicious diseases
If The Moon is in conjunction or in good aspect of beneficial stars, then The infirm body shall recover

If The Moon is decreasing in light and motion, and afflicted either by the square or opposition of Mars (unless presently after conjunction with Jupiter the vigor of the disease remit), then The disease is not curable but mortal
If The Moon applies to benevolent planets, then The disease will soon be cured
If During the increase of the Moon in number and light, then The disease increases
If When the Moon grows slow in motion, then The sickness diminishes

If Those who at the time of their first lying down are oppressed by the malignant influence of Saturn or Mars, then They are commonly heavy and drowsy, unwillingly moving their diseased members, stupefied or benumbed with immoderate cold, or molested with unnatural defluxions

If Who fall sick upon any malevolent configuration of the Sun or Mars, then Become disturbed in their minds, perplexed in their fancies, are troublesome and very rugged in their deportments, the superficial parts of their bodies being inflamed with a fiery heat

If All infirmities or passions, or tremblings of the heart, and such as proceed from the mouth of the Stomach, Diseases and pains in the Arteries, Veins and Joints, have original from the evil influence of Mars and the Sun, then Infirmities or passions, or tremblings of the heart, and such as proceed from the mouth of the Stomach, Diseases and pains in the Arteries, Veins and Joints

If Continued fevers, phrensies, exulceration and inflammation of the Lungs and Lights, and such like Diseases, draw their original from Saturn and Mars, then Continued fevers, phrensies, exulceration and inflammation of the Lungs and Lights, and such like Diseases

If Whosoever shall first lie down of their sickness, the Moon decreasing in light and motion, in any of the twelve Signs, and afflicted by Saturn, his square, opposition or conjunction, then Shall in part or in all, be partaker of such Diseases as follow, during the time of the continuance of their Disease: Viz. With Head-ach, or heaviness of the Head, or Rheume falling down into the Nostrils, Singing in the Eares, stuffing in the Head, weariness or dulness of the Eyes, distillation of Rheumes and corrupt humours falling from the head into the Throat and Wind- pipe, weak Pulses and inordinate, drowsiness of mind, loathing of the Stomach, intemperate or unseasonable Sweats, hot within, cold without, more afflicted by night then day if the Moon be not savoured by the aspect of any good Planet
If The Moon is not favored by the aspect of any good planet, then The sick party will die

If Fevers proceeding from obstructions and distemper of the Moon in conjunction with Mars, viz, of the inward parts neer the Liver and Lungs, occasioned by too much Luxury, or from Surfeits or inordinate Repletion, then Their Pulses are lofty and high, but immoderate, an inflation or puffing up of the Body, ulceration of the Lungs
If The Moon is not supported with some gentle aspect of the Fortunes, then The party will hardly live fourteen dayes
If The Moon is, as before said, in any good aspect, then Beyond expectation the sick may recover

If Who shall sick, the Moon in Gemini, afflicted of Saturn, by square, opposition or conjunction, then Have the original of their Disease occasioned by weariness of the mind, and over-burdening it with multiplicity of affaires, or some weariness in travel, or over-much exercise of body, seare of a small Leaver, the paine disperses it selfe all over the body, but principally in the Arteries or Joynts

If The Moon is in Gemini, at the time of any ones Decambiture, then The Vitals much afflicted and the sick inclinable to a Consumption, with such the Pulfe is rare and little, afflicted with frequent sweatings, Simptomes of the Spleen, and the Disease more troublesome in the night then in the day

If Saturn, together with Mars, at the same time afflict the Moon, then The sick will not live above ten dayes, unless the savourable aspect of Jupiter or Venus intervene, and then after a long time, the sick may recover

If Who falls sick the Moon afflicted of Saturn in Cancer and Leo, is much afflicted in the Breast with tough melancholly Matter, or with slimy, thick Flegme, is vexed with Cough, then Affliction in the Breast with tough melancholly Matter, or with slimy, thick Flegme, is vexed with Cough

If Moon and Saturn in conjunction or opposition and Mars afflicting, and the Lord of the ascendant is impeded by the Lord of the eighth, then the sick will not live above ten days, unless the favorable aspect of Jupiter or Venus intervene, and then after a long time, the sick may recover.

If Moon in Cancer afflicted by Saturn, then the sick is much afflicted in the Breast with tough melancholly Matter, or with slimy, thick Flegme, is vexed with Coughs, or abundance of Spittle and moisture, Catarres, Hoarcenesse, distillation of Rheumes, or descending of Humours into the Breast, their Pipes are narrow and obstrunanded, small Feavers, and many times seare of a Quotidian Ague, but usually a Quartan Ague sollower holding a long time, Belly-ake, or Lome infirmnesse in the Reynes or Secrets
If Moon decreasing and near Saturn, then the sickness will continue a great space of time

If Moon impeded by Saturn in Sagittarius, then the sicknesse shall proceed of ill melancholly Blood, the lick will be oppressed with unkindly heat in the Breast, intension of the Heart-strings, with violent Leavers, the Pulles are troubled, externall and internall Heats doe much annoy the sick, sometimes they are taken with a fit of the Stone, or saintnesse of Heart, or Swooning, and if the disease doe continue long, the lick is in danger of the Black-jaundies.
If Moon comes to the opposition of Mars, and Jupiter or Venus do not assist, then many times the lick dyeth

If Moon in Capricorn afflicted by Mars, then the Sicknesie proceeds from Crudities and evil digestion in the Stomach, and from too much viscous Flegme obstructing the Bowels and Intrailes, pricking or shooting under the Ribs, inordinate Leavers
If Moon in aspect of Mars, then the sick afflicted with the Wind-collick, with extreame Melancholly, with the Gout or aches in the Thighes and Feet
If Moon in Capricorn, unfortunated by Saturn, then the Diseased continues sick a great while

If Moon in Aquarius afflicted by Saturn, then the Disease hath its originall from some Surfet of Wine, Gluttony, or Meat not fully digested, or too much Venery, the Breast is disaffeanded, so also the Head, no appetite to eat, a loathing in the Stomack, the Cough, Hoarcenesse, distillation of Rheums afflict him
If Moon in Aquarius afflicted by Saturn, then troubled with great paines in their Joynts, Knees and Thighes, and an itching in those parts they searing a Sciatica

If Venus afflicting the Moon in Aries, then the Disease is in Ano or Anglice Arse-hole, usually an Ulcer theresor the Hemorroids or Piles, or some Exulceration or Bubo, [Anriice] a botch in the Privy-members

If Moon afflicted by Mars in Taurus, then there's no retention of Urine, the party is vexed with the Stone in the Bladder, or with a swelling dropsical Humottr, offending and swelling about their Knees and Legs
If Moon afflicted by Mars in Taurus, then sometimes they have a Flux, if a man then the Gonorreaj if a woman, too much aboundance of Menstrua’s

If Moon in Gemini afflicted by Saturn, then the diseased party is sensibly oppressed With Deflux of subtill, thin, sharp Humours, grieses in the Arteries or Joynts, seare of a Feaver, extremities of heat and cold, many times a double accede of a Feaver

If Moon in Virgo, afflicted by a opposition of Mars, then the Disease to proceed from Blood infeanded with choller and nxlancholly, and many times by too great painestaking, er violent exercise, and cold thereupon taken
If opposition of the Moon and Saturn, then the sick hath a spice of the Gout, or some Tumour or Swelling in his Hands, or Thighes, or Feet
If Mars have any ill aspect to the Moon, then proves a violent burning Feaver

If Venus in Scorpio afflicted by Saturn, then The Disease proceeds from Cold or Melancholly, with subtill, thin Distillations, heavinesse of the Breast and Stomack, difficulty of breathing, dry Coughs, the Lungs oppressed, intended Feavers, more pained in the night then in the day times

If Moon in Aries afflicted by Mars, then The Sicknesse hath beginning, or is occasioned from too much labour, wearisomnesse or toyling the Body and Minde, a want of sleepe and due refrelhment of nature
If Moon have past the opposition of her owne place, then if fortunes have any good aspect to the Moon, then the Sicke is recoverable

If Moon afflicted by Mars, then grieved wichwinde or noyse in the head, with saint fits or passions of the heart; or many times they have either a sore throat, or are troubled with a rising there, and in danger of suffocation

If Moon in Libra afflicted by Jupiter, then The Malady its cause, is from cold distillations ; the party is afflicted with continual! Feavers, oft and continuall sighings, pricking or shootings under the Paps, extensions of the precoidiacks and hart-strings
If Moon in any of the 12 Signes and off re sed by Mars, or indeed by Saturn, then Diseases

If Moon in Aries in square or opposition of Saturn, then their disease shall proceed from a distempered affection of the Membranes or Pellices of the braine, continuall Feavers,no rest or quietnesse; an hot thirsty mouth, extreame thirst, drinelfe of the tongue, hot Liver or inflamation thereof, much heat in the Breast, high and sablated Purses, keeping no order, a Phrensie may be seared, or deprivation of Senses

If Moon next after her reparation from the Malevolent beames or aspect of Saturn doe also apply to square or opposition of Mars, and she decreasing in light and slow in motion, then small hopes of life
If Moon in Aries affixed of Jupiter, then the party is almost ready to run mad, or hath some extreame paine or griefe in his Belly or sinal guts occasioned by chollericke obstructions

If Moon in Taurus in square of opposition of Saturn, then the party falling sicke, hath too much abundance of ill Blood, continuall Feavers, the whole frame of the body obstructed, inflamation of the throat, neck and hinder-part therof, ach of the bones, ungentle slumbers, but no sleepe, a foolish longing after Wine and cold water

If Moon in Taurus afflicted by Saturn, then the Patient is afflicted with the strangury, or stone, or gravell in the Reines and Kidneys, with pestilent soare throats, or horcenesse, or some malignity there in that member

If Moon in Gemini afflicted by Mars, then usually shall undergoe a violent and dangerous Feaver, obstructions, high and inordinate Pulses attend such , the blood is too hot, and a necessity there is of emiffion of blood, the whole body being neer corruption, by reason of the ranknesse of blood

If Moon in Cancer afflicted by Mars, then to be pained all over the body, the Disease in no place set led, their Blood extreamly windy, corrupted, and what not, some lameness or griese in their Armes or joynts , and afflicted with the stone or heat in the reines, and sometimes spitting of blood

If Moon afflicted by Mars in Leo, then the Sicke is sensible of great abundance of sweet fleagme in his stomacke,hath too much ingurgitated, taken some surfeit, oft vomits or desires so to do, with eversion or turning of the ventricle

If Moon in Virgo afflicted by Mars, then too much blood abounds and therby strong Feavers, very weake Pulses, raving and strong raging fits, a disturbed Braine, depravation of appetite, heavinesse and drowfineffe all over the body, many distempers of the heart ; the body in danger of a Consumption
If Moon in Virgo afflicted by Mars, then usually they dye about the ninth day after the first salling sicke, if other configurations of heavens accord

If dangerous square or opposition of Mars and the Moons in this Signs, then the Blood over- heated, the party almost starke raging mad, choller in excesse abounding,the body over-dryed,a probability of the Plurisy b saintnesse and swooning,or the hears very much afflicted
If Moon in Libra afflicted by Mars, then alteration or flux in the Belly, or miseraicks sollows this unluckie position

If Configurations of heavens accord, then Blood over-heated, the party almost starke raging mad, choller in excess abounding, the body over-dryed, a probability of the Plurisy, faintness and swooning, or the heart very much afflicted

If Moon in this sign afflicted by Mars, then Alteration or flux in the Belly, or miseraicks follows this unluckie position, small Feavers, the originail choller and melancholly, the Pulfe remisie, eversion of the ventricle, loathing of food, death within thirty dayes, if the fortunes assist not
If Afflicted upon this aspect or aspects, then Tormented with the winde, chollicke, many times weaknesse in the legges or neere the ancles
If Moon at time of the decumbiture, or first falling ill, was afflicted by Mars in Libra, then Disease is not easily removeable

If Jupiter in Aries in detriment, then Patient is grieved with plenitude of Blood, and from that cause hath intended Feavers, high Pulses, abstaines from sleepe, hath no naturall rest, an inflamation all over the body
If Sick people upon this kinde, then Oppressed with Blood over-heated, have taken some sorfeit by disorder in dyet, many times have the stone or gravell in their kidneys, or great heat therein

If All manner of Questions, then A meer sorfeit gotten by riot and excess, and most that I have seen thus afflicted have been cured by Vomit; many times it turnes to a looseness, or a rotten silthy scough, sometimes spitting of blood
If Mars in Cancer, then The Disease is all over the Body, in every part, and most violent burning Feavers follow

If Its neither better or worse with the party inquiring, then He or she hath some grievous infirmeneffe in his or her privie parts. There’s usually some exulceration, the Pox small or French (or Mesels, if children) the Hemerods or Pyles
If The Sicke offended, then Snasfling in the Head, or some grievous colds or rheumes in that member
If The party look like a wanton, then The French Pox or a Gonorrea or burnt Prick
If The party, then Scabby and oppressed with breakings out
If This, then Corruption of Blood
If A modest party propound the Question, then There’s cause to distrust soule play
If Man propound, then The Wife may be faulty

If Moon in Sagittarius afflicted by Mars, then The sick party is grieved with a very desperate Disease, occasioned from surfeiting or gluttony, or too much repletion; he is tormented with high Feavours, with cholerick passions, with the Flux or Laske: the Pulses are sew and saint, or beat slowly and weakly
If The Sicke escape the seventh day, or know properly that day when the Moon comes to a true square of the place she was in at first lying downe, then There’s then hopes of recovery

If The sick party, then His Blood is over-heated by some inordinate exercise, that he burnes extreamly, sometimes the malignancy of the pestilent Feaver is such, he is twice or thrice let Blood; they are besides many times offended with the Hand and Foot-gout,or Itches and breakings out, and sometimes with sore Throats, and at other times sharp Rheums offend their Eyes
If Jupiter in Capricorn afflicted by Mars, then No perfect concoction, Choller abounds, the sick desires to vomit, there’s inappetency of the Ventricle, a swelling

If Jupiter in Capricorn afflicted by Mars, then A Flux of the Belly sollowes Immediately continual! or oft returning Feavers inflamation of the Brest some Exulceration offends the party or a cholerick humour his Hands or Joynts of his Fingers. Obstruandive and constringent Medicines are useful! their Pulses are rea.i Je and slow

If The sick, then Inclinable to the Yellow jaundies, their Countenance meagre and their Persons exceeding leane and that the Blood all over the Body is disaffected and the Disease is very hard to be cured by the most Learned, such usually have very little Blood or their Blood is corrupted to purpose or in the highest measure
If Moon be slow in motion and decreasing in light when a Disease first takes the party and is afflicted, then Infirmity proceeds from most sharp and violent affections or vehement passions

If Any savourable Planet casting his good aspect unto the Moon either at her first square to her owne place or when she comes to opposition of that degree of the Zodiac she was in at the first lying downe, then Gives present remedy after twenty dayes

If Upon the preceding aspect especially upon the opposition, then The sick hath been pained at the Heart troubled with swooning sits had a most desperate Feaver the Blood swelling in all the Veines high Pulles; sometimes they complaine of great paine in their Brest and draw their Wind with great difficulty

If Moon is afflicted of Mars in Pisces and is increasing in light and swift in motion, then The Body is full of grosse Humours the Disease proceeds from too much ingurgitation swilling and drinking the Disease is most prevalent in the night time the party is vexed with a phrenetick Out rage or Delirium hath sharp burning Feavers vehement thirst and is desirous of Wine

If The party sick or enquiring when the Moon is of Mars and in Pisces so afflicted, then Oppressed with a violent Loosenesse and grievously complaining of paine in their Bellies or an extraordinary rotten Cough and continuall defluxion of Rheume from the Head into the Throat, the party almost suffocates therewith, their Bellies swollen, and they in danger of a Dropsie
If Questions concerning sick people, then Give the Ascendant and his Lord and the Lord of the Figure for Signisicators of the sick party
If Sign of the sixth, the Lord of that House, Planets therein placed, and place of Heaven and Signe wherein the Moon is, then Require the Disease or part afflicted, with relation to the ascendant
If The seventh house, then Represents the Physician
If The tenth house, then Represents his Medicines
If Lord of the seventh be unfortunate, then The Physician shall not cure
If The tenth house or Lord thereof, then His Physick is improper
If The fourth house, then Signifies the end of the sicknesse, and whether it will terminate quickly, or endure long
If Fixed Signes, then Prolong the Disease
If Common Signes, then Vary the Disease
If Moveable ones, then Shew an end one way or other quickly

If Physician who first visits his Patient in the hour of Saturn, then His Patient shall either be long sick, or long in curing, and suffers much torment in his cures nor shall he be cured, until almost both Physician and Patient despaired
If He that first enters upon a cure in the hour of Venus, then Shall have a Patient disaffected to him, intend partly disdaine or reject his Medicines, his pains ill rewarded, and his person slighted

If He that first visits his Patient in the hour of Jupiter or Sun, then Shall have good words of the sick, be well esteemed and paid for his paines; though he faile of the cure, yet shall he receive no prejudice thereby, I meane, in point of estimation
If When a Urine is brought, then Let the ascendant represent the sick party, whether the Querent come with consent or noy for the Urine was sometimes of the sence of the sick

If No Urine or consent of the sick party come to the Physician, then The Ascendant presents the Querent, but the person and sicknesse must be required according to the relation the Querent hath to the sick party
If A man for his Servant, then The sixt shall shew his person, not his Disease, that must be from the sixt to the sixt, which is the eleventh, and lie in aliis, where no consent is
If In every Disease, then Have care to the place of the Moon, for she is a general Signisicatrix in all things

If The sick party is in great danger of death, when at the time of the Question asked, or when the sicknesse first invaded the sick party, both the Sun and Moon are under the Earth, then The sick party is in great danger of death

If No light is in this World without the presence of the Sun or Moon, then No safety, or hopes of recovery in the sick, when they are obscured or subterranean at first lying downe of the sickle, and ids a greater argument of death, if either of them be then afflicted
If The square or opposition of the Fortunes, then It destroyeth not
If The benevolent aspect of the Infortunes, then Does not profit, unless that aspect be with Reception
If The Sun and Moon, or Lord of the Figure, or Lord of the ascendant be free from affliction, and have no affinity with the Lord of the eighth, then The sick party will recover
If Two of these Signisicators be so affected, then It will goe well with him
If Lord of the ascendant in his Fall, unfortunate or Combust, or else the Lord of the Figure, then It is doubtful the sick party will dye of that Infirmity

If The Signisicator of the sick is seeble, and the Lord of the eighth strong and afflicting him, then It is much seared the sick party will dye of his then infirmnesse, nature being weak, and the Disease prevalent

If The Lord of the ascendant be placed in the eighth, and received of the Lord of the eighth by some essentiall Dignity, though the Lord of the ascendant receive not him againe, then The sick party recovers beyond expectation
If Significator of the sick is feeble, and the Lord of the eighth is strong and afflicting him, then the sick party will die of his then infirmness, nature being weak, and the Disease prevalent

If Lord of the ascendant is placed in the eighth, and received of the Lord of the eighth by some essential Dignity, though the Lord of the ascendant receive not him again, then the sick party recovers beyond expectation
If Lord of the ascendant and the Moon do both apply by ill aspect to a Planet under the Earth, then the Physician may justly fear his Patient
If Lord of the ascendant and the Moon do both apply to a Planet above the Earth, then expect the contrary
If Lord of the eighth being on the cusp of the tenth, and the Lord of the ascendant under the Earth, then there's great fear of recovery
If Moon is swift in course, and increasing in light, and by a good aspect apply to the Lord of the ascendant, though under the earth, then it hastens the cure
If Moon is swift in course, and increasing in light, and by a good aspect apply to the Lord of the ascendant, though under the earth and any Reception be, then the cure must needs be sooner
If application be above the Earth to the Lord of the ascendant, then the cure must needs be sooner
If Lord of the ascendant is in the sixth, then it protracts the Disease, and is An argument of much affliction therein
If Lord of the sixth in the ascendant, then it protracts the Disease, and is An argument of much affliction therein
If square or opposition of the Lord of the sixth to the Lord of the ascendant, then it protracts the Disease, and is An argument of much affliction therein
If two benevolent Planets Jupiter and Venus be most powerfull in the Figure, then judge well to the sick, or hope well
If the Infortunes be most strong, then judge the contrary
If application of the Lord of the fourth, to the Conjunction of the Lord of the eighth, then prolongs the Infirmity, and also signifies Death
If Lord of the fourth be an Infortune, then prolongs the Infirmity, and also signifies Death
If Lord of the fourth be a benevolent, then expect the contrary
If Retrograde Planet Significator of the Disease, then shows the continuance of it, and argues the Bodies Consumption, Backsliding and Relapses
If Significator being stationary, then shows aptness and desire to vomit, and the oft change and variation of the Disease
If Significator being combust of the Sun, then the sick dies
If Planet stationary, then hath time to work mischief, because he moves not
If Significator in his Fall or Detriment, then shows ill and much danger, and argues much distrust and fear in the sick party
If ascendant and the Moon being afflicted, and the Lord of the one and Dispositor of the other not so, then the Disease is in the Body, not in the Spirits
If ascendant and Moon free from misfortune, and their Lords unfortunate, then the grief lies in the Spirits, not in the Body
If both ascendant and Moon afflicted, then both Body and mind are tormented
If malevolent Planet behold the ascendant and not the Moon, then the Disease is in the Animals, not in the Body
If Lord of the sixth in the ascendant, ninth, eleventh or tenth house, then the Disease is manifest
If Lord of the sixth in the seventh or fourth, then it lies occult and not known
If Lord of the sixth in the twelfth or eighth, then it lies occult and not known
If Moveable Signs, then easily cause the Disease to vary
If fixed Signs, then make it long and permanent, and not without much difficulty
If removable signs, then commonly show recovery, or that if now here, now and there
If removable signs, then the sick party is much better at one time then at another
If In the beginning of Diseases, ever fear the ill posture and affliction of the Moon, then judge of the good or ill attending the sick
If In the beginning of Diseases, ever fear the ill posture and affliction of the Moon mixed with the well or ill being of the Lord of the ascendant, then judge of the good or ill attending the sick

If Moon at the time of the sick Decumbiture or Question asked, be then in a place where an Infortune was in the Radix, or in square or opposition thereof, then the cure will goe on the more hardly, and be more difficult to overcome
If in the beginning of a sickness the Moon be in the sixth of the Nativity, then it doth manifest death, unless a Fortune at one of those times cast thither his benevolent beams
If in the beginning of a sickness the Moon be in the fourth of the Nativity, then it doth manifest death, unless a Fortune at one of those times cast thither his benevolent beams
If in the beginning of a sickness the Moon be in the seventh of the Nativity, then it doth manifest death, unless a Fortune at one of those times cast thither his benevolent beams
If in the beginning of a sickness the Moon be in the eighth of the Nativity, then it doth manifest death, unless a Fortune at one of those times cast thither his benevolent beams
If in the beginning of a sickness the Moon be in the twelfth of the Nativity, then it doth manifest death, unless a Fortune at one of those times cast thither his benevolent beams

If ascendant of the sicknesse is opposite to that of the Nativity, and is either the fourth, sixth, eighth, twelfth or seventh, the ascendant of the Revolution being not the same, then it shows hardly any recovery
If Lord of the second doth infortunate the Lord of the ascendant, then the sick shall not be cured without much expense of his money
If Lord of the second doth infortunate the Lord of the ascendant, then if he dye, he spends most part or much upon his cure to no purpose
If Sun in the ascendant, then brings usually health immediatly
If Sun in the sixth, then the sicknesse presently changes
If Lord of the eighth be combust, then the sick shall recover and not dye at that time
If Jupiter be in a good aspect to the Sun, then Fear not the death of thy Patient although the Lord of the ascendant apply to the sord of the eighth
If a sicknesse takes one first, at what time the Moon separates from combustion, then the sicknesse will encrease untill the Moon come to Opposition of the Sun
If Lord of the ascendant being unfortunate in the eighth, then the Patient will much encrease the Disease and retard the cure by his ill government and carelessness
If Significator of the sick Occidental, then denotes chronic Diseases
If Significator of the sick Oriental, then new Sicknesse
If Moon separates, then the Disease decrease
If Moon applies, then the Disease encrease
If Saturn be author of the Disease, then proceeds of Cold
If Mars or the Sun, then it proceeds of Heat

If Moon is more afflicted of Saturn when she is increased in light, then beware in the beginning of a sicknesse when the Moon is thus unfortunated, and under Hand and doth more mischief when he is in masculine Signes, Oriental and above the Earth

If Moon is more oppressed by Saturn in her wane, then beware in the beginning of a sicknesse when the Moon is thus unfortunated, and under Hand and doth more mischief when he is in masculine Signes, Oriental and above the Earth
If Saturn is author of theDilease, then it would be permanent, or of some continuance

If Angles of the Figure are all fixed, the Moon and Sun both in fixed Signes, and in square, out of Angles, both in the Termes of an Infortune, and Lord of the ascendant and sixt in a fixed Signe, then all these portended the longitude of the Disease
If Antiscion of Saturn falls near the Sun, then thereby afflicts him, being the Luminary of the time

If Sign ascending is in the Figure most afflicted by the corporall presence of Saturn, who is partly Lord of the eighth house, then from that house and Signe must we require the Disease, cause, and member grieved

If Virgo being the Signe of the sixt, is fixed, afflicted by Saturn and Mars who is Lord of the sixt house is in Capricorn, a fixed Signe, earthly and melancholly, of the same nature and Triplicity that Virgo, the Signe ascending, is of, then the Patient to be wonderfully afflianded with the Spleen,with the Wind-chollick,and melancholly obstructions in the Bowel or small Guts,small Feavers, a remisse Pulst

If Moon a generall Signisicatrix in Pisces, being afflicted by her proximity to Saturn and posited in the ascendant, in an earthly, melancholly Signe, together with the other Signisicators, then the Patient to be wonderfully afflianded with the Spleen,with the Wind-chollick,and melancholly obstructions in the Bowel or small Guts,small Feavers, a remisse Pulst

If Ascendant in an earthly, melancholly Signe, together with the other Signisicators, then The Patient to be wonderfully afflicted with the Spleen, with the Wind-chollick, and melancholly obstructions in the Bowel or small Guts, small Feavers, a remisse Pulst
If Signe is the Signe amending, and Jupiter and Mercury therein, then The sick was perplexed with distempers in his Head, slept unquietly
If Sun in perfect square to Saturn, Lord of the sixt in Signes fixed, then Death
If The ascendant was extreamly afflicted by the presence of Saturn, he being naturally ill, and accidentally almost Lord of the whole eighth house, then Death
If Moon was neer Cauda Leonis, and afflicted by the crosse influence of Saturn in that house which signifies Life, viz, the ascendant, then Death
If Moon did separate from the trine of Jupiter, Lord of the ascendant, in Signes of long ascensions and did transfer his vertue to Venus Lord of the eighth, then Death
If Nature at time of the Crysis overcome the malignity of the Disease, then a good Crysis
If The sicknesse prevaile, then a pernicious and ill Crysis
If Moon is in configuration with a benevolent Planet, then expect some remissnesse in the disease
If Moon meets at that time with the unlucky aspect of an Infortune, then gives the Physician little hopes at present; the Crysis is then ill
If Moon is in Aries, then the Attractive vertue is strengthned
If Moon is in Taurus, then the Retentive is sortified in Sanguine people
If Moon is in Gemini, then the Digestive is sortified in Cholerick people
If Moon is in Cancer, then the Expulsive is sortified in Melancholly people
If Moon in Aries, then Attractive virtue is strengthened in Phlegmatic people
If Moon in Taurus, then Retentive virtue is fortified in Sanguine people
If Moon in Leo, then Digestive virtue is fortified in Melancholic people
If Moon in Sagittarius, then Expulsive virtue is fortified in Choleric people
If Saturn, then Stirs up the virtue retentive
If Fiery Signs, then Stir up red choler
If Earthly Signs, then Stir up black melancholy
If Airy Signs, then Stir up blood
If Lord of the Ascendant is joined to the Lord of the 10th house by a perfect aspect by degree and minute, then The servant shall be freed easily and in a short time
If Lord of the Ascendant is separated from the Lord of the 10th house by some few minutes, then The servant is as good as freed already from his master

If Neither the Moon nor Lord of the Ascendant is separated from the Lord of the 10th, then Consider if either of them be separated from the Sun, or joined with him, judge in the like nature of them as you would have done with the Lord of the ascendant and the Lord of the tenth, the same aspects considered
If Lord of the Ascendant is cadent from an Angle and has no aspect to the Ascendant, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Lord of the Ascendant is in aspect with any Planet in an Angle, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Lord of the Ascendant is in aspect with a Planet that beholds the Ascendant, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Lord of the Ascendant is in the 3rd or 9th house, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Lord of the Ascendant is joined to a Planet in the 3rd or 9th house, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Moon is cadent from an Angle and has no aspect to the Ascendant, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Moon is in aspect with any Planet in an Angle, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Moon is in aspect with a Planet that beholds the Ascendant, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Moon is in the 3rd or 9th house, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Moon is joined to a Planet in the 3rd or 9th house, then He shall be freed from his service, and shall depart from his Master
If Lord of the Ascendant is in the 1st, 10th, 7th, or 4th house, then He shall not be delivered from his Master
If Moon is in the 1st, 10th, 7th, or 4th house, then He shall not be delivered from his Master
If Lord of the Ascendant is joined to a Planet being in the 1st, 10th, 7th, or 4th house, and that Planet is Direct, then He shall not be delivered from his Master
If Moon is joined to a Planet being in the 1st, 10th, 7th, or 4th house, and that Planet is Direct, then He shall not be delivered from his Master
If Planet being in the 1st, 10th, 7th, or 4th house is Retrograde, then It argues freedom, but with slowness and difficulty
If Lord of the Ascendant is impeded in the 1st, 10th, 7th, or 4th, by a corporal conjunction of any ill Planet, then He shall not be freed from his service
If Lord of the Ascendant is impeded in the 1st, 10th, 7th, or 4th, by a square of any ill Planet, then He shall not be freed from his service
If Lord of the Ascendant is impeded in the 1st, 10th, 7th, or 4th, by an opposition of any ill Planet, then He shall not be freed from his service
If Lord of the Ascendant is Centring combustion, then He shall not be freed from his service
If Lord of the Ascendant and hour are of one nature or Triplicity, then The Question is radical and fit to be judged
If First degrees of any Sign are ascending, then The matter is not yet ripe for judgment
If Later degrees of any Sign are ascending, then The matter of the Question is elapsed, and it’s probable the Querent hath been tampering with others or despairs of any success
If Saturn or Mars in the 10th, and they peregrine or unfortunate, then The Querent hardly gets credit by that Question
If Venus in the 10th, then The Querent hardly gets credit by that Question
If Lord of the Ascendant is unfortunate, then It is better than the Moon being unfortunate
If Saturn is a significator without reception, then They show tardity and detriment in the Question
If Mars is a significator without reception, then They show tardity and detriment in the Question
If Venus and Jupiter are significators and apply by trine or sextile, then They best perform the matter in question when in Essential Dignities
If Fortunes are Signisicators, then Hope well
If Infortunes are Signisicators, then Fear the worst
If Moon is void of course, then There's no great hopes of the Question propounded, that it shall be effected
If Moon is in your sign, then The evil may be the less, for then she is not much impeded by being void of course
If Moon is separated from a Fortune, then Good has already been done
If Moon is separated from a Malevolent, then Ill has already been done
If Application of the Moon by a good aspect and in a good house to a good Planet, then Intimates the strong hopes of the thing intended
If Application of the Moon to a Planet in his Fall, then Signifies anguish, trouble and delays in the thing demanded
If Retrograde Planet or one in his first station, Signifrcator in the Question, then Denotes ill in the Question, discord and much contra
If Evil Planets are Signisicators and predict evil in the thing quesited, then The vengeance is more heavy
If Evil Planets are Signisicators and foretell of any good, then It’s less than what is expected, it’s imperfect, and nothing therein comes, without infinite solicitation and affliction
If Planet that is slow in motion, then Prolongs the thing quesited after, so that it’s hardly performed
If Infortunes are Signisicators of any evil and the Fortunes cast an aspect unto them, then The evil intended formerly is lessened
If Fortunes are Signisicators and are cadent or ill placed in Dignities or behold not the ascendant or are Retrograde, then Then are they impeded and shall perform little, if not received
If Infortune with Reception, then He performs but little
If Fortunes are Signisicators with Reception, then The thing is perfected
If Planet Peregrine, then He is malicious beyond expression
If Planet in essential Dignities, then He is less malicious
If Planet in House, Exaltation, Triplicity, or Angles, and then have signification in a Question, then They perform the thing desired
If Fortune lends assistance unless he be in essential Dignities, then He performs matters wholly, else but by halves
If Fortunes and Infortunes are either weak or equally ill placed, then Promise no success upon that demand
If Signisicator of the question is either Combust, or in Opposition to the Sun, then He will then signifie nothing of the matter, no good, nor is he able to bring any thing to perfection
If One Infortune joined to another, if good be signified by their aspect, then Yet will it have no effect, or come to any thing
If One Infortune joined to another, if evil be signified by their aspect, then It’s probable that it may fall out with more malice then expected
If Lord of the Ascendant out of his essential Dignities, Cadent, then Shows the Querent is out of all hopes in his business
If Planet within twelve degrees of the Sun, then Is said to be under his Beams, and then hath no fortitude, let it be in what Signe it will
If Good is signified by planets in their detriment, then it will have no effect, or come to any thing
If Evil is signified by planets in their detriment, then it may fall out with more malice than expected
If The Lord of the ascendant is out of his essential Dignities, Cadant, then the Querent is out of all hopes in his business
If A Planet within twelve degrees of the Sun, then has no fortitude
If A Planet within sixteen minutes of the Sun, then is in Cazimi and has an addition of fortune and is wondrous strong
If Significator commits his dispositorship to Mars or Sun and they are Orientally, then the matter is sooner performed
If Significator commits his dispositorship to Mars or Sun and they are Occidentally, then the matter is later performed
If Planet that is Signisicator of the thing desired is in a fixed Sign, then shows stability and that the thing shall continue, whether it be begun, or is to be begun
If Planet that is Signisicator of the thing desired is in a common Sign, then shows the oft probability of perfecting the thing, and yet not its conclusion
If Planet that is Signisicator of the thing desired is in a moveable Sign, then shows a sudden resolution or conclusion of the matter one way or other
If Lord of the ascendant or the Moon with the Head or Tail of the Dragon, then brings damage to the Question propounded

If Degree of the ascendant, or place of the Signisicator is in the place of any Eclipse at hand, then the matter propounded shall insensibly receive prejudice when least is expected, and hardly be concluded
If Moon is impeded in any Question, then there will be the like stay, demur or hinderance in the thing quesited
If Moon is going to Wane, then you may scare the life of the Querent
If Moon is going to Wane in a Journey, then ill success
If Moon is going to Wane in Marriage, then an ill end of Wooing

If Lord of the Question or the Moon is in a Sign opposite to his essential Dignity, then the Querent hath no good hopes of his demands, he desires not, nor doth he delight in it, nor doth he care whether it be performed or not

If Consider diligently the Planet impediting the Signifier of the thing demanded, and what house he is either Lord of, or is posited in, then from the nature or person of that house require the cause obstructing
If Significator is near to an Angle, then the more good you may expect
If Significator is placed in a Succedant house, then less good
If Significator is placed in a Cadent house, then little good
If Moon is in conjunction with the Sun, then the ill effects of the Infortunes doth much afflict her
If Moon is combust, then great affliction

If Infortune assail your Signisicator, and whether they be both Peregrine, Retrograde, Cadent , or in Signs contrary to their owne nature, then it may then be doubted they infer such a mischief in the question, as is inevitable, according to natural causes
If Planets that are Signisicators in anything are in conjunction and in a Signs agreeing to their owne nature, then then the thing quesited after is brought to perfection with much ease and facility
If Any frustration or prohibition be before the perfect aspect, then the Planet frustrating describes the party or cause hindering the matter demanded
If Moon well dignified in any house, then the querent gets by men, or things denoted by that house
If Moon ill dignified in any house, then damage from that house
If An unfortunate Planet in the seventh house in questions of Marriage, then threatens ill agreement in Marriage
If Lord of the eighth is impeded or Unfortunate in the eighth, then the querent shall receive prejudice by the death of some woman, or concerning some debts due unto him from men deceased
If Venus and Jupiter well dignified in what house, then you may expect benefit from such men and things as are signified by that house
If Saturn is in what house, then the querent shall receive damage, scandal or slander from men and matter signified by the house he is in
If Lord of the ascendant or Moon apply to the Lord of the seventh house, then the Querent shall have his or her desire, yet with many petitions, solicitations and prayers
If application by square or opposition and with reception, then it shall be brought to pass with a kind of slowness, labour and travail

If Lord of the seventh apply to the Lord of the ascendant, or the Planet to whom the Moon doth apply, unto the Planet from whom she is separate, then the matter shall be brought easily to pass, with great good will of the man or woman quesited after
If Lord of the seventh be in the ascendant, then the matter shall be brought easily to pass, with great good will of the man or woman quesited after
If application by trine or sextile aspect, then the matter shall be brought easily to pass, with great good will of the man or woman quesited after
If Lord of the ascendant doth apply to the Lord of the 7th house, then the Marriage shall be performed and done
If Moon doe apply unto Venus, and is strong, increasing in her motion, and in some of her owne Dignities, and the Moon likewise, then the Marriage shall be concluded
If Venus doe behold the Sun, and the Sun have any dignity in the ascendant, and behold the Lord of his house, viz. of the Signe wherein he is, then the Marriage shall be concluded

If Planet applying, and he to whom he doth apply, be both cadent from the angles, and especially if their Lords doe not behold them, then there shall be good hopes at the first, but by dallying and trading the times, there shall be trouble, and no Marriage at all performed

If Moon, Sun, Venus and Lord of the seventh, and Lord of the ascendant be in angles, and they beholding one another, or if their Lords behold them, though with square or opposition, then the matter shall be first in despair or suspended, but afterwards it shall by the will of God, be brought to pass, and finished by the consent of all parties
If Lord of the seventh be in the ascendant, or apply to the Lord thereof, then it will unwillingly be consented unto by the party desired
If Lord of the ascendant or the Moon apply unto the Lord of the seventh, or be in the seventh, then the Querent shall obtaine his purpose by his owne labour
If there be translation of light between them, then it shall be effected by the meanes of Friends or Acquaintance
If Moon in the tenth, then it shall be effected by the meanes of Friends or Acquaintance
If application of the Moon with Jupiter, then effecteth the matter, but by mediation of Friends
If application of the Sun and Moon, especially when Sun hath dignity in the seventh, then idem
If Lord of the ascendant be in the seventh, or with the Lord thereof, or behold him with a good aspect, then it doth give great encouragement for effecting the matter
If Lord of the seventh be in the ascendant, or with the Lord of the ascendant, or behold him with a good aspect, then it doth give great encouragement for effecting the matter
If The Planet the Moon applies unto is the natural significatrix of women., then Judge accordingly.
If The Lord of the ascendant is in the seventh house., then It shall be.
If The Moon separates from a planet and applies to another planet., then It shall be.
If The Sun and Moon apply to each other., then It shall be.
If The Lord of the first house is in the seventh house., then It shall be.
If The Lord of the seventh house is in the first house., then It shall be.
If There is a translation of light from the significators., then It shall be.
If There is reception of the significators., then It shall be.
If There is collection by a more weighty planet., then It shall be.
If The significators are in interchangeable dignities., then It shall be.
If The Moon in the seventh house gives virtue to the Lord of the ascendant., then It shall be.
If The Moon in the seventh house gives virtue to the Lord of the seventh house., then It shall be.
If The Lord of the seventh is in the ascendant., then The party desired loveth best.
If The Lord of the ascendant is in the seventh., then The querent loveth best.
If The Lord of the seventh is in the seventh, especially in one of his own houses., then The party desired is free from love.
If The Lord of the seventh is in the seventh, especially in one of his own houses., then The party desired hath little mind to Marriage.
If The Lord of the seventh is in the seventh, especially in one of his own houses., then Her portion is known, or the man's.
If The significators of the party desired are not beholding the significators of the Querent., then Notes the love of some other more than the Querent.
If The significators of the party desired are not beholding the significators of the Querent., then Notes an averseness to the party now enquiring.
If The application of the significators is frustrated., then Notes the Marriage to be broken off.
If Marriage is prelaged by translation of light., then It shall be furthered by such a one.
If Marriage is prelaged by collection., then It shall be furthered by such a one.
If Marriage is promised by Saturn., then Note performance with much adoe.
If Marriage is promised by Jupiter., then Note performance with much adoe.
If Marriage is promised by Venus., then Note performance with much adoe.
If Marriage is promised by the Sun., then Easy.
If Marriage is promised by the Moon., then Easy.
If Marriage is promised with Reception., then Best of all.

If An evil Planet frustrates their aspect., then Consider what evil Planet it is.
If An evil Planet prohibits them., then Consider what evil Planet it is.
If An evil Planet interjects his Rayes betwixt the Signisicams., then Consider what evil Planet it is.
If The Lord of the ascendant is in the seventh., then It signifies Marriage to the Querent.
If The Lord of the seventh is in the ascendant., then It signifies Marriage to the Querent.

If The Moon beholds Venus by a good aspect., then It signifies Marriage to the Querent.

If The Signisicators are in the Dignities of Venus., then The party enquiring doth marry.

If The degree of the application of the Lord of the ascendant to the Lord of the seventh is in common Signs., then The Marriage shall be performed in Months.

If The Lord of the seventh is in the ninth house., then He shall marry a Stranger.
If The Lord of the seventh and of the ascendant are in one quarter of Heaven., then Usually the party marries one near to the place of their own abode.

If The Lord of the seventh and of the ascendant are in one Sign., then Usually the party marries one near to the place of their own abode.
If The Moon is with Saturn., then She is faire, slender and pleasant.
If The Sun is in trine or sextile to Saturn., then Wise and painful.
If The Sun aspects Jupiter., then Honest.
If The Sun aspects Mars., then Note contention, separation and discords.
If Venus aspects Mars., then Note contention, separation and discords.
If The Lord of the seventh is in an angle and the Lord of the ascendant is in a succedent house., then The woman is best defended.
If The Lord of the ascendant is in an angle., then Judge accordingly.
If The Moon or the Lord of the ascendant is received in an angle, and he that is the receiver be an heavy or ponderous Planet., then The querent shall be Master.
If The Signisicators shall be sound weak, ill dignified, or in cadent houses., then That party shall be subject.
If The Lord of the eighth is strong., then She is wealthy.
If A Planet in the eighth is strong., then She is wealthy.
If Jupiter applying to the Lord of the eighth by a good aspect., then She is wealthy.
If The Lord of the eighth is not strong., then She is poor.
If A Planet in the eighth is not strong., then She is poor.
If Jupiter not applying to the Lord of the eighth by a good aspect., then She is poor.
If The Signisicators of them, either of the man or woman be vitiated or joined to evil Planets, and they not Signifiers in the Question., then Showeth unlawful Marriage.
If The Signisicators of them, either of the man or woman be with Mars or Saturn., then Showeth unlawful Marriage.
If The Lord of the ascendant and Lord of the seventh aspect each other with trine or sextile., then They agree well.
If Lord of the ascendant combust in a fixed sign, then the woman has been tempted and made a harlot by violence or she was unwillingly drawn to lewdness
If Lord of the ascendant in a fixed sign and the ascendant fixed, then she is still a virgin and honest
If Moon in the ascendant with Saturn, then the woman was abused by force and not by her consent

If the ascendant is a fixed sign and the Lord of the ascendant in the 5th or the Moon in the 5th or the Lord of the 5th in the ascendant or both of them corporally joined in one sign, then it seems the woman has newly conceived or was lately tempted

If the ascendant is a fixed sign and the Lord of the ascendant in the 5th or the Moon in the 5th or the Lord of the 5th in the ascendant separated asunder by three degrees, then it seems the woman is delivered or free from the party she was lately in fear of
If Lord of the seventh or the Moon joined to the Lord of the ascendant with Reception, then the woman is not scandalous but honest
If Lord of the seventh or the Moon joined to the Lord of the ascendant without Reception, then the woman is not scandalous but honest
If the Lord of the seventh or the Moon or either of them is joined to the Lord of the Triplicity of the ascendant, then it then seems she has a friend that she loves besides her husband
If any of them is joined to the Lord of the seventh and Moon is separated from the Lord of the ascendant, then it then seems she has a friend that she loves besides her husband
If The Lord of the seventh void of course, then the woman has no friend

If The Lord of the seventh, the Moon or both separate from any other planet but the Lord of the ascendant and he not separated above three degrees, then the woman did love another, but she has now left him

If the Lord of the seventh with Saturn, then the Woman is blameless, without he be in aspect with some other Planet, then she is worthy to be blamed now, was also in times past, and in times to come will be
If the Lord of the seventh with Saturn, then if she be not faulty in act, she is in her desires and affections
If Lord of the seventh or Moon joined with Venus, then it seems the woman has a sweetheart whom she loves, and that uses her company

If Venus be with Mars, and the Lord of the seventh be joined as before said, then it diminishes the malice, and though the woman love some martial man, yet he cannot bring her under his Yoak, yet is she half put to it, and much persuaded
If Venus be with the Lord of the seventh, or with Moon, and one sign in conjunction, or with Mercury, then the woman has a sweetheart in contract, not far from her house
If Venus be with the Lord of the seventh, or with Moon, and one degree in conjunction, then then he is in the house, and one of the familiars of the man that asks the Question, or of her own Husband

If the Moon or Lord of the seventh separate from Venus, or from him, or that they be separated, then perchance the woman had a Lover before she knew her Husband, but now they have one forsaken the other, or they have forgot each other

If Lord of the seventh, or Moon Lady of the seventh, in Taurus or Libra, and Venus beholding any of them, viz either of the Signs, or Moon, then she did a long time love one, but she has little to do with him now

If Lord of the seventh, or Moon Lady of the seventh, in Taurus or Libra, and Venus in Reception with one or other, viz Moon and Venus, then she did a long time love one, but she has little to do with him now
If Moon Lady of the seventh, in conjunction with Venus or Jupiter in any Sign whatsoever, then the woman has loved a certain man, a Nobleman or a Bishop, viz a man of better quality then her self
If there is a mutual Reception between Moon and Venus, then they still love one another, or still some acts of kindness pass between them, and there wants nought but opportunity
If The Lord of the seventh or Moon joined to Mercury, then the woman seems to love a young Clerk, or a Merchant, or witty, nimble

If The Lord of the seventh joined to Jupiter with Reception, with or without any aspect, then the Woman cares not for men, but has friendship with women, or speaks wantonly, but is not naturally lewd or vicious
If The Lord of the seventh or Moon in conjunction with Saturn, then the woman loves an Old man, or a Religious man, or a Country-man, or a man of plain sober carriage
If The Lord of the seventh joined to the Sun, then she loves at present, and did love a certain great person, according to the quality of the Demandant
If The Lord of the seventh joined to the Sun with Reception, then he has or may have, if he please, to do with her
If The Lord of the seventh joined to the Sun without Reception, then he cares not for her, but has quite forsaken her
If more Planets do behold the Sun as well as the Lord of the seventh especially Saturn or Mars, then more men have had to do with her, nor is she yet amended, but somewhat tardy
If Venus in the seventh house, so that he be not in his own house, then she has one
If Saturn in the seventh, then she loves one but lies not with him
If Mars in the seventh, then she has much ado to be honest
If Jupiter in the seventh, then she is a merry wag, and is thought to be wanton, but is not
If Sun in the seventh, then she had a Friend but has not now
If Mercury in the seventh, then she as yet has none, but she will have, and will be common
If Moon or Sun in the seventh, then she is chaste and has no Friend
If The Lord of the seventh void of course, then she has none
If The Lord of the seventh with Moon, then she has none
If The Lord of the seventh or Moon joined to Venus, then she has a Sweetheart or one whom she is familiar withall, that she does much respect, but I say not in any dishonest way

If Lord of the ascendant or Moon joined to the Lord of the seventh, in any of the dignities of the Lord of the seventh, and in the ascendant, eleventh or tenth, then the querent shall obtains the party desired
If Lord of the ascendant or Moon joined to the Lord of the seventh, in any of the dignities of the Lord of the seventh, and hardly in the seventh, then the querent shall obtains the party desired

If both Signisicators behold each other with trine or sextile, out of the ascendant and eleventh, or ninth and seventh, or seventh and fifth houses, with or without Reception, no prohibition, frustration or abseission, or Retrogradation of the principall Signisicators intervening, then the Match will be concluded if the querent please
If a square or opposition be between the Signisicators and no Reception, then the matter will come to nothing
If A square aspect with Reception of Signisicators, then perfects the matter, but with a little difficulty
If no Reception, then there’s onely hopes, no grounds whereby to judge the thing shall be effected really
If the Lord of the seventh has been in the ascendant, then the querent has loved most
If the Lord of the ascendant was in the seventh, then the quesited loved best

If the Signisicators aspect not one another, but some Planet transfers their influence one to another, and this with a benevolent aspect, then then shall the matter be brought to pass by one signified by that Planet, whose description you may frame according to the Signs wherein he is, and his quality from the house he is Lord of

If Planet transfers the Signisicators disposition, observe who that Planet is, and to whom he commits his disposition, and whether he be not Retrograde, Combust or unfortunate, or Cadent from his owne house, or in the figure, or in opposition or square aspect to an Infortune, without Reception, then the matter will be effected and continue, especially if he be a Fortune , and the Matrimony will take well,and the people love together
If Lord of the ascendant and the Moon behold one another by trine or sextile with Reception or not, then the Conception is legitimate
If Lord of the ascendant and the Moon behold one another with square or opposition, with mutual Reception, and perfect aspect, then the Conception is legitimate
If the Lord of the ascendant or the Moon in the 5th, or if the Lord of the 5th be in the ascendant, without the evil aspect of the Infortunes, then the Child conceived is legitimate and true begotten
If the Fortunes one or both do behold the 5th house or his Lord, then the Child conceived is legitimate and true begotten
If Saturn, Mars or Sun behold the 5th house, or Lord thereof, then there may be just suspicion the Child is conceived in adultery, and the Mother was stuprated
If Lord of the seventh house beholds the ascendant with a true and good aspect, then she shall again return and come into favor

If Lord of the seventh house does not behold the ascendant but another Planet who is not impeded beholds the ascendant, then the woman shall return through the mediation of some person who shall interpose his friendship with the Husband or Friend, and reconcile them
If Moon is above the Earth, and Venus beholds the ascendant with a trine or sextile, then the woman shall return to her house or Sweetheart with ease or without any great noise

If Sun is under the earth, and Venus above, and Venus beholds the ascendant with trine or sextile, then the woman or wise shall be received, but with some importunity and delays, with much ado, and a great deal of labor, and all her Neighbour shall take notice of it
If Moon is increasing in light, and in any good aspect to the ascendant, then she shall return, but with much solicitation
If Moon is decreasing in light, and in her second or last quarter, and not near the Sun's beams, but beholding the ascendant, then she will return with much ease and quickly

If Venus is Occidental, Retrograde and hastening to Combustion, then then of her own accord the woman will return to her Husband, fearing by her absence she shall offend him, and she is sorry she ever departed from him

If Venus is lately separated from the Sun's beams, then then it repents the man that he gave occasion to his Wise to absent herself, or that he abused her; but the woman will be angry and malapert, and seems sorry that she shall return, nor will she much respect her Husband after that time
If Moon applying to the Lord of the ascendant, or to the Lord of the twelfth from the ascendant, or to the Lord of the house of the Moon, then the thing missing shall be found again
If Moon apply to none of these, nor abide in the ascendant nor in the second house, then the thing lost or miscarried shall not be found
If Lord of the house of the Moon is in the third, or in a sextile to the ascendant, then there is some hope of finding the thing again, during that aspect with the degree ascending

If Lord of the house of the Moon separate himself from the Lord of the twelfth, eighth, or sixt house, and apply unto the degree of the house of Substance, (what aspect soever it be), then there is hope to find it again
If Lord of the house of the Moon do behold Moon, then there is hope to find it again
If Moon is fortunate by any of the two Fortunes, then the thing that is lost chanced into the hands of some trusty body, which keepeth the same, and would fain restore it again
If Fortune apply to the ascendant, or behold the same, or the Moon behold the ascendant, then that faithful person will restore the same again to the owner

If Lord of the ascendant did last separate from Saturn, then the cause of the lost thing was through forgetfulness of the owner, who knows not where he laid it or it is forgotten by reason of some cold or sickness which afflicted the loser, especially if Saturn be Retrograde

If Lord of the ascendant did last separate from Sun or is in the house of Sun, then then by the means of the King, study of hunting or pastime, or by means of the master of the Family, or a Gentleman

If Lord of the ascendant did last separate from Venus or is in her house, then then by drinking Cards or Dice, or making merry in an Alehouse or Taverne, or by pastime, or singing and dallying with women, andc
If Lord of the ascendant did last separate from Mercury or in the house of Mercury, then by reason of writing, or sending, or dilating of Letters, or going on a Message

If Lord of the ascendant did last separate from the Moon, or in the house of the Moon, then it was lost by too frequent use, and showing the Commodity or thing lost, or the party made it too common, or some Messenger, Widow or Servant lost the same
If Lord of the house of the Moon separating himself from any Planet, then he fled away of his owne accord
If the lord of the house of the Moon be not separated from any Planet, but that another Planet is framing himself from him, then some one or other took it and fled away
If Lord of the house of the Moon applying to the Lord of the eighth house from her, then it is dead
If Lord of the Moon applying to the Lord of the eighth house from the Moon, then it is dead, or it shall dye very shortly

If Significator of the Thief be in the ascendant, or giveth his vertue to the Moon, or the Moon to him, it is stolen, or the Lord of the ascendant to the Signifier of the Thief, or the Signifier of the Thief apply to the Lord of the ascendant by square or opposition, or the Moon by square or opposition, or the Lord of the house of the Moon,or of her Terme, or the Lord of the second house, or Sun or his Lord, or if any Planet be in the ascendant, and give his power to the Signifier of the Thief, or the Signifier to him by square or opposition, then it is stolen
If Lord of the house of the Moon separating from any Planet, then it is fled of its owne accord
If Lord of the house of the Moon does not Separate, but some other from him, then it is driven away
If Moon applying the Lord of the ascendant, or second house, or to her Dispositor, then it shall be sound
If Moon in the ascendant, or her Dispositor in a trine or sextile, then gives hopes to find it
If Dispositor of the Moon separating from the Lord of the sixth, eighth or twelfth, and applying to the Lord of the ascendant, or to the degree of the second house, then good hops also
If Moon in aspect to her Dispositor, then good
If Moon infortunate of the Lord of the sixth, eighth, or twelfth house, then it is in the hands of an ill person that will not depart from it, chiefly if the Infortune behold the Moon
If Lord of the ascendant in the eighth house, then death in prison
If Principal significator of the ascendant retrograde, then death in prison
If Lord of the sixth house beholds the Lord of the ascendant with a conjunction or trine, then the fugitive will be had again
If Lord of the sixth house beholds the Lord of the ascendant with a square or opposition, then they will be stopped
If Lord of the sixth house beholds the Moon or the Lord of the house of the Moon with a trine or sextile, then had again
If Lord of the sixth house beholds the Moon or the Lord of the house of the Moon with a square or opposition, then stopped or stayed in some Village or Towne
If Lord of the ascendant applies to the Lord of the seventh with a conjunction or trine, then the Querent shall recover the things lost or Fugitive, gone away
If Lord of the ascendant in the seventh house, then the Querent shall recover the things lost or Fugitive, gone away
If Lord of the seventh in the ascendant, then it sheweth the same with more facility
If Lord of the seventh applies to the Lord of the ascendant, then it sheweth the same with more facility
If there be any translation of light betwixt the Lord of the seventh and the Lord of the ascendant, then it sheweth the same with more facility
If Moon in the ascendant, then the Fugitive shall returne and be recovered or shall be so hindered that he shall come againe
