If Lord of the house of Journeys is in the ascendant, then short return or good speed according to the length of the Voyager
If Lord of the seventh is in the ascendant, then short return or good speed according to the length of the Voyager
If Lord of the ascendant in the seventh, then short return or good speed according to the length of the Voyager
If Significators be in angles especially in fixed Signes, then either destruction of his Journey or else slow,or to be a great while absent
If Fortune be In the house of Journeys, then health of body
If good Fortune in the mid-heaven, then mirth and jollity or gladnesse in his journey or that he shall have good company
If Fortune in the seventh and fourth, then prosperity and a good end of the Journey or Voyage
If Lord of the house of Journeys be in a fixed Slgne, then continuance and long tarrying
If Lord of the house of Journeys be in a common Signe, then he shall change his mind from his first intended thoughts, or remove from one journey to another

If Moon in questions of Journeys, be in the sixth, or in conjunction to the Lord of the sixth, then sicknesie to him that travels, and impediments in his occasions, and that his businesse shall be for the most part seeble, weak and slackly handled, his endeavours and designes shall be much crossed

If Lord of the ascendant be sortunate, or in the house of trust, or not opposite to the same, then successe and prosperity, and the accomplishing of his businesse, though with many difficulties and obstructions
If Lord of the ascendant in the ascendant or mid-heaven, or giving his power to another Planet being in any of those places, then he shall returne, and is thinking of it

If Lord of the first be in the Seventh, or in the angle of the earth, then his returne is prolonged, and that as yet he is not gone far from the place he went unto, nor hath he yet any desire thereunto
If Almuten of the first be in the ninth or third from the ascendant, applying to a Planet in the ascendant, then he is in his journy homewards
If Lord of the ascendant in the 8th or second, applying to any Planet in the tenth, then he is in his journy homewards
If Lord of the ascendant be cadent, and doe not apply to any Planet in an angle, or behold the ascendant, then token of tarrying
If Lord of the ascendant or the Moon doe apply unto a Planet Retrograde, then token he is comming
If Lord of the ascendant himself be Retrograde,(viz. the Signisicator of the absent) and doe behold the ascendant, then token he is comming
If Lord of the ascendant be infortunatt, then some let or hinderance which makes him to tarry,or that he cannot come
If Moon give her power or light to the Lord of the ascendant, being in the ascendant or neer the ascendant, then he shall come shortly, or intends it
If Moon be in the seventh, ninth or third, applying to the Lord of the ascendant, then he commeth

If Moon be separate from a Planet which is in the left side of the ascendant (that is, under the earth)and applyeth to another Planet on the right hand of the ascendant, ( that is, above the earth ), then he commeth
If Moon be on the right hand of the ascendant, and apply to a Planet in the mid-heaven, then he commeth, yet with slownesse
If Lord of the house of the Moon be infortun ate, then tarrying, and let or hinderance in comming home
If Lord of the ascendant is in the ascendant, or in the second, entring or arising towards the ascendant, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the ascendant be Retrogrades or the Planet which was the signisier of the Journey be Retrograde, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the ascendant apply to the Lord of the tenth, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the mid- heaven apply to the Lord of the ascendant, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the ascendant be in the mid- heaven, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the mid-heaven be in the ascendant, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Moon received of the Lord of the tenth, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the ascendant received of him, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the tenth applies to the Lord of the ascendant, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the ascendant is in the mid-heaven, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the mid-heaven is in the ascendant, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the tenth received of the Lord of the ascendant, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Lord of the ascendant received of the Lord of the tenth, then he that is absent is coming, and that he returneth speedily and shortly
If Planet from whom the Lord of the ascendant is separated, then Signifier of the state and condition in which he lately was, and of those actions which are past
If Planet unto whom the Lord of the ascendant doth apply, then Signifier of the state he is now in
If Planet to whom the Lord of the ascendant applies after him, then Signisicator of the state of him unto whom he shall come, or intends to come
If Significator going out of one Sign and entering into another, then he went out of the place he was in, and is entered another, or taken another journey in hand
If Combustion in a question of one that is absent, then captivity, imprisonment, or some great jet
If Combustion near the house of death or the Lord of the house of Death, then death except God doe miraculously deliver him
If Mercury in the ascendant or mid-heaven, then Letters shall come from him, or some Newes very shortly
If Mercury separates from a Fortune, then good newes, and joy full
If Mercury separates from an Infortune, then judge the contrary
If Mercury in a movable Sign beholding Saturn or Mars, then it is a lye
If Mercury in a fixed Sign, then it is true
If Mercury in a common Sign, then part true and part false
If Moon apply to the Sun, then he goeth to Kings or States or in service of such men viz . of such as are able to maintaine him
If Moon apply to Saturn, then he is directed by old men or men of gravity and yeers
If Moon apply to Jupiter, then Religious persons or Gentlemen doe imploy him
If Moon apply to Mars, then men of Warre Captaines or such like are the cause
If Moon apply to Venus, then Women- kind or desire to purchase such things as Women love
If Moon apply to Mercury, then Merchants Schollers, or he travels to see variety of Countryes and to learne the languages
If Moon herselfe signifie the cause, then he is hired or that he is publikely imployed
If Lord of the ninth in the ascendant, then he goes of his owne accord
If Lord of the ninth in the second, then for gaine
If Lord of the ninth in the third, then purposely to travell
If a sortunate Planet be in the ascendant, then the beginning of his journey shall be sortunate
If the mid-heaven be sortunate, then the rest of his journey shall prove in like manner
If the seventh is fortunate, then it shall also happen well when he is arrived to the place he intends or is at his journeys end
If Fortunes be in the fourth, then all shall happen well in his returne homeward
If Lord of the ascendant, the ninth house and the Moon be all well afflicted, then it sheweth a sortunate Journey
If Lord of the ninth be in the ascendant, then it hafteneth the journey
If Lord of the ascendant in the ninth, then it hafteneth the journey
If Lord of the ascendant in the seventh, then it hafteneth the journey
If Significators in cadent houses, then it hafteneth the journey
If Significators in movable Signes, then it hafteneth the journey
If the angles movable, then it hafteneth the journey
If the angles be fixed, then it prolongeth the journey
If the Signisicators posited in fixed angles, then it prolongeth the journey
If Lord of the ninth in the ascendant and fortunate therein, then sortunateth the same Voyage
If Signisicators and Moon flow in motion, then a tedious Journey
If Lord of the ninth be fortunate, then the man hath good knowledge in him, and what is reported of the man is true, and he will doe good by his knowledge
If Lord of the ninth is Orientall or Occidental, then the man hath good knowledge in him, and what is reported of the man is true, and he will doe good by his knowledge
If Lord of the ninth is cadent from an angle, then the man hath good knowledge in him, and what is reported of the man is true, and he will doe good by his knowledge
If Lord of the ninth is in an angle or succedant house, then the man hath good knowledge in him, and what is reported of the man is true, and he will doe good by his knowledge
If Lord of the ninth behold the Lord of the ascendant with sextile or trine, then the man hath good knowledge in him, and what is reported of the man is true, and he will doe good by his knowledge
If a Fortune behold the Lord of the first, then the man hath good knowledge in him, and what is reported of the man is true, and he will doe good by his knowledge
If a Fortune behold the Lord of the first with Reception, then the man hath good knowledge in him, and what is reported of the man is true, and he will doe good by his knowledge
If the aspect is by quartile or opposition, then the man knowes much, but shall doe no good thereby
If an Infortune aspect either the Lord of the ninth or first, then the man hath wearied himself, and will dbe, but to no purpose, sor he shall never attain the perfection of the knowledge he desires
If Fortune in the ninth house, then there is Science in that man
If Lord of the ninth fortunate and behold the Lord of the ascendant, then there is Science in that man
If Infortunes in the ninth house, then there is none, or little knowledge in him
If Lord of the ninth infortunate, and behold not the Lord of the ascendant, then there is none, or little knowledge in him
If Moon and Lord of the ninth both apply to Fortunes, then there is knowledge in the man
If Moon and Lord of the ninth apply to Infortunes, then it signifies the contrary
If ninth house, and the Lord thereof be infortunate, nor behold the Lord of the ascendant, then no knowledge in him, or such as by which he will never doe himself good
If fortunate Planets are policed in the East Quadrant, then direct the querent to travell Eastward
If fortunate Planet promiling happineffe unto him be in the South Quarter, then direct him Southward
If fortunate Planet promiling happineffe unto him be in the West Quarter, then direct him Westward
If fortunate Planet promiling happineffe unto him be in the North Quarter, then direct him Northward
If Infortunate Planet in the eighth, then little gaine, or imall succefse In the Countrey the Traveller is going unto
If malevolent Planet in the second, then no great succefse in the Countrey, wherein after the voyage is performed theTraveller intends to settle himselfe
If a good Planet in the eighth house, then happinesse of a party in the Countrey he is going unto
If a good and sortunate Planet is in the second, then live happily after our returne
If Cauda in the second when you returne, then beware
If Cauda in the eighth when you set sorward, then beware
If a good Planet in the eighth house, then happineffe of a party in the Countrey he is going unto
If Cauda in the second, then Beware when you returne
If Cauda in the eighth, then Beware when you set sorward
If the Lord of the ascendant is joyned to the Lord of the ninth, then the Clerke or Priest shall obtaine the Benesice desired
If the Lord of the 9th be in the 9th, then the Clerke or Priest shall obtaine the Benesice desired, but with labour and industry
If the Lord of the 9th behold the 9th, then the Clerke or Priest shall obtaine the Benesice desired, but with labour and industry
If the Lord of the ascendant be joyned to the Lord of the ninth, then the attaining of the thing sought after
If the Lord of the ascendant be in the ninth, then the attaining of the thing sought after
If the Lord of the ascendant be Retrograde, then a destruandion of the matter after it seemcs to be in a good sorwardneffe, or neer accomplifhing
If the Lord of the ascendant be otherwise unfortunate, then a destruandion of the matter after it seemcs to be in a good sorwardneffe, or neer accomplifhing
If the Lord of the ascendant be Combuft, then a destruandion of the matter after it seemcs to be in a good sorwardneffe, or neer accomplifhing
If the Lord of the ascendant be in □ afpeft of an infortune without reception, then a destruandion of the matter after it seemcs to be in a good sorwardneffe, or neer accomplifhing
If the Lord of the ninth be in the sirft, then procuring the thing sought after without much Peeking on the querenfs behalf
If the Lord of the ascendant in A to Sun, then the acqhiiition o the Benesice or Preserment

If Lord of the ascendant is in an airy sign and the Moon is in the same triplicity, then The querent is signified.
If Lord of the 9th house is not in aspect with the Lord of the ascendant, then No beneficence is indicated.

If Mercury is in Cancer and the 7th house, opposing the ascendant, then Some women will inform against him or prejudice him in his suit.
If The angles of the figure are common and not fixed, then The matter is unstable.
If The sign of the 9th house is a fixed, stable sign, then The matter is stable.
If Saturn is in the terms of Jupiter in the 9th house, then Saturn, a general significator in religion, religious rites, and ceremonies, is now standing to direction.
If Saturn is departing out of his exaltation, having been retrograde therein for a long time, and is now impeded by Mars, then The matter is impeded.
If Venus, Lady of the 9th house, is in Virgo, her detriment, and in the 8th house of the figure, but 12th house from her own, the 9th, then The matter is weakened.
If The Moon is separating from Venus in the 8th, then going to be void of course, afterwards she squares with Mars, then with Saturn, then The matter will struggle hardly and stoutly.

If Saturn in the 9th house is of a severe, surly, rigid, and harsh temper, then The Presbytery shall be too strict, sullen, and dogged for the English Constitutions, little gentle or compliant with the natures of the generality.
If Mars is peregrine, occidental, and fortified by no essential dignity, or supported with the favorable aspect of either of the Fortunes, then The matter is weakened.
If There is reception between the Moon and Mars, but no aspect, then The matter is weakened.

If Lord of the 10th signifying Authority, is separated and separateth apace from Saturn, then The Gentry, or supreamest people of this Kingdome, doe in part decline from the severity of the too too austere Clergy or Presbytery, mistrusting a Thraldome rather then a Freedome to ensue hereupon.
If Mars represents the Countryman, for he afflicting the house properly signifying Presbytery shows the cause, then The Souldiery will distate it.

If The Moon, after a little being void of course, runs hastily to the square of Mars and Saturn, then The Commonalty will defraud the expectation of the Clergy, and strongly oppose them, that the end hereof shall wholly delude the expectation of the Clergy.
